Anyone know whether this is true or not and to what extent it blocks? Magnesium Stearate is in most supplements I've seen.
>
> [http://www.wellnessresources.com/health/articles/the\_facts\_on\_magnesium\_stearate/](http://www.wellnessresources.com/health/articles/the_facts_on_magnesium_stearate/)
>
> I hate being confused...I generally like Mercola's stuff...and hes against Stearate...I don't even know this guy...but maybe Mercola isn't right on this...has anyone read into this more?

The doctors involved in the Iodine Protocol have made these decisions for us. I agree it is all very confusing for us to decide for ourselves which supplement to take & why. To keep things simple, I just follow Doctors Orders:

> \- - - NOTE ON DOSAGES: The range of doses are intended for the amount of Detox problems people have. Small dosage are for those with minimal detox symptoms. Large dosages are for people with severe detox symptoms or who cannot absorb iodine.
> \- - Â½ tsp Natural Celtic Salt, Himalayan Pink Salt, Redmonds Salt or Hawaiin black salt
> \- - - If the sea salt is pure white, it is unacceptable (minerals have been stripped out )
> \- - 200+ mcg selenium (L-selenomethionine preferred)
> \- - 400 mg Magnesium - Glycinate preferred (calcium supplements will purge magnesium )
> \- - 2,000+ mg Vitamin C - Ester-C preferred (not absorbic acid) - do not take with liquid iodine
> \- - ATP Cofactors caplet contains both 100mg B2 & 500mg B3 non-flushing in the correct ratio. Take 1/2 caplet with iodine up to 25mg, then one caplet for each 50 mg iodine, if iodine sufficient & no symptoms after 1 yr, this supplement can be discontinued.
> Vitamin D3 Gelltabs 5,000 IU are recommended to boost the immune system to get the most out of iodine. Complete Details at [http://tinyurl.com/iodine-references](http://tinyurl.com/iodine-references)

[http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout](http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout)
As Dr. Brownstein & his team makes changes, I update my files accordingly. The primary Team Members include Dr. Buist, Dr. Brownstein, Dr. Abraham, & Dr. Flechas, who have treated more than 4,000 patients with iodine supplementation. Author [Lynne Farrow](http://www.amazon.com/The-Iodine-Crisis-About-Wreck/dp/098603200X/ref=cm_cr_pr_product_top) also keeps her website [BreastCancerChoices](http://breastcancerchoices.org/iprotocol.html) updated with the Iodine Team's recommendations. You can also download Dr. Buists [Iodine Guide](http://steppingstonesliving.com/resources/iodine/).

I'm sure there are many other ways to do the iodine protocol, I just prefer picking one doctor to follow to help prevent brain fog. There is a wide variety of time tested recommendations to be found [at the Curezone.](http://curezone.com/forums/f.asp?f=815) Check them out. I would not know if they are better or not. Here is our best Q&A File that might help you decide for yourself:
[http://curezone.com/faq/c.asp?a=13,281,2962](http://curezone.com/faq/c.asp?a=13,281,2962)

Best to you, let us know what you decide
Grizz

Could you point me to anything I could show her?

endless,
**"Taking iodine for Hashi is like pouring gasoline on a fire = FALSE, DEAD WRONG"**
This is an old wives tale that just keeps going on & on & on. Iodine is the cure. However the reason for this old wives tale is that iodine by itself is bad whether Hashimotos or not. Iodine supplements absolutely require selenium. NEVER take iodine without selenium, and never take selenium without iodine.

**Here are the links to Hashimotos:**
[https://docs.google.com/document/d/...5jXDmOp0HwpdBS6VY/edit#heading=h.8eltjvzb6ets](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_q9ixGwZFon9yidvmZ0IFbp3Vj5jXDmOp0HwpdBS6VY/edit#heading=h.8eltjvzb6ets)

[https://docs.google.com/document/d/...5jXDmOp0HwpdBS6VY/edit#heading=h.q6cw9ojckwx1](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_q9ixGwZFon9yidvmZ0IFbp3Vj5jXDmOp0HwpdBS6VY/edit#heading=h.q6cw9ojckwx1)

These doctor articles will set the record staight.

Grizz

### GlenPDQ — 2013-04-13T08:46:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-83971>

That ebook "What You Don't Know About Iodine..." mentions that tissues that aren't used to having a ready supply of iodine are like water pouring off a dried up sponge. It says it takes a while for the tissues to open up to the influx of iodine, but when they do, the iodine reserves drop lower temporarily due to the tissues gobbling it up. I took advantage of the 99 cent special and got the PC Kindle version. It made me feel more secure about upping my Iodoral to 50 milligrams per day divided into two 25 mg doses. For the last year I've only been using one 12.5 mg tablet per day.

### Raiken3712 — 2013-04-14T03:08:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-84016>

> [MeghanK said:](/goto/post?id=83995)
>
> What are the detox symptoms you get so I know what to expect when I start the Iodoral... I'm also working on getting my desiccated thyroid dosage right so I'd like to be able to separate out which symptoms go with what....

[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Re0I1CxVrs7FBFjYAst6CcEUPS4rucIQjbPLXVquje8/edit?pli=1](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Re0I1CxVrs7FBFjYAst6CcEUPS4rucIQjbPLXVquje8/edit?pli=1)

Here is a good list from Grizz's wonderful Iodine references. Its a crazy big list.

I've also heard Coffee enemas with organic coffee if done right are both safe and effective for detoxing. I haven't had any experience myself though I might try in the future. I haven't found a reasonably priced setup with included instructions.

If anyone has done one of these I would love to hear about how it worked if at all and potential negatives or problems.

For some reason I didn't comprehend the possible reason I may not be getting detox symptoms. I was wondering if I even had any toxin issues because I wasn't clear that I was getting anything that I don't normally have.

I've always had issues with pimples in various places...that I scratch off...I'm bad with pimples...and scabs. Anyway I figured after starting Iodine with the detox that I would get one of those reactions. Perhaps more pimples than normal...not that I've noticed. I don't think my mood is perceptibly worse. I think I've always been pretty generally depressed. Not major depression but generally not feeling like life is all that great..not enjoying it very much.

It didn't increase at least from what I can tell. Perhaps my kidney's and liver are just dealing with the released toxins adequately or I'm underestimating how many pimples/level of depression and I have grown worse as part of a detox reaction. It could also be that I don't have bromide/fluoride or other harmful toxins to detox...but considering I still haven't stopped eating things with these chemicals that isn't likely.

Unless of course there is something that would block my body from detoxing. If I'm taking Iodine that should be automatic right? Some amount of detox from just having all that Iodine around would happen regardless of co-supplements I think just based on why Iodine causes these chemicals to leave the body. Actually I suppose if Iodine can't bind to the receptors for some reason perhaps its not pushing these chemicals out...I am taking Magnesium and ATP cofactors though. I'm not eating my Brazil nuts for Selenium consistently enough...but with everything taken into account I should be getting rid of some of the toxins.

....health sure is complicated.

### Grizz — 2013-04-15T11:32:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-84131>

I am happy to see everyone doing such a great job getting into iodine supplementation. The results can be dramatic as everyone can see in the Testimonials file that I have been keeping up:
[http://goo.gl/OCZHT](http://goo.gl/OCZHT)
The most surprising testimonials are about breast pain with the usual lumps & bumps and how quickly symptoms fade away. I've had reports of fibrocystic breast symptoms GONE in less than 1 week, where doctors had insisted that mastectomy was the ONLY solution, confirmed by cases in my own neighborhood. How many MILLIONS of women are suffering needlessly ? ? IMO, it is a TRAVESTY that iodine is censored by the drug companies. We must all re-double our efforts to get the word out to everyone.

In my experience with iodine, the most typical symptoms are bloat, skin breakeouts, rash pimples and headache. Also TSH can be expected to drop temporarily. There are many other [symptoms in the list](http://tinyurl.com/Detox-Help), but I haven't seen anyone reporting them.

I will be on vacation for most of the next 2 weeks, so will check back in when I return.
Grizz

### Grizz — 2013-04-17T01:42:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-84307>

CT,

Here are your simplified instruction for iodine.
[http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout](http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout)

Every cell in the human body requires iodine, especially the thyroid, brain & the prostate in men.

The Adrenals are a mind numbing insanely brain blasting subject. Here are some links to help clear up the complexity.

Overlooked Connection to Iodine Deficiecy
\==========================================
There is a lack of knowledge about the critical connection between the adrenal glands and the thyroid and iodine deficiency.
When the cortisol supply is low in your system, the body is unable to utilize the thyroid hormone (T3) creating hypothyroid symptoms.
DESICCATED THYROID
If you are taking desiccated thyroid to rebuild the lack of iodine in your system, an increase in the dosage creates extremely unpleasant side effects. The rest of the GREAT article:
[http://www.iodine-resource.com/adrenal-fatigue.html](http://www.iodine-resource.com/adrenal-fatigue.html)

Adrenal Information - 1
[http://www.stopthethyroidmadness.com/adrenal-info/](http://www.stopthethyroidmadness.com/adrenal-info/)

How to treat Adrenals
[http://www.stopthethyroidmadness.com/adrenal-info/how-to-treat/](http://www.stopthethyroidmadness.com/adrenal-info/how-to-treat/)

About Adrenal Fatigue
[http://www.adrenalfatiguefocus.org/using-licorice-root.html](http://www.adrenalfatiguefocus.org/using-licorice-root.html)

Finally the index to thyroid & Adrenals
[http://www.stopthethyroidmadness.com/site-map/](http://www.stopthethyroidmadness.com/site-map/)

ust something to consider...

SIGNS AND SYMPTOMS OF ADRENAL FATIGUE
[http://www.womentowomen.com/adrenalfatigue/symptoms.asp](http://www.womentowomen.com/adrenalfatigue/symptoms.asp)

Stresses like a demanding job, raising a family, relationship issues, lack of sleep, financial pressures, improper nutrition, dieting, and unresolved emotional distress cause the adrenal glands to produce cortisol. However, when we ask our adrenal glands to chronically sustain high cortisol levels, they eventually become fatigued. The resulting adrenal dysfunction not only affects cortisol production, but also impairs the adrenals’ ability to produce and balance hormones like DHEA, estrogen, progesterone, and testosterone.

SYMPTOMS OF ADRENAL FATIGUE
The following symptoms are your body’s way of telling you that it is not receiving the support it needs to maintain healthy adrenal function.
\* Fatigue
\* Feeling tired despite sufficient hours of sleep
\* Insomnia
\* Weight gain
\* Depression
\* HAIR LOSS
\* Acne
\* Reliance on stimulants like caffeine
\* Cravings for carbohydrates or sugars
\* Poor immune function
\* Intolerance to cold

RELATED CONDITIONS
Adrenal fatigue is a likely factor in several medical conditions such as the following:
\* Fibromyalgia
\* Hypothyroidism
\* Chronic fatigue syndrome
\* Arthritis
\* Premature menopause

Every challenge to the mind and body creates a demand on the adrenal glands. And the list of challenges is endless: lack of sleep, a demanding boss, the threat of losing your job, financial pressures, personality conflicts, yo-yo dieting, relationship turmoil, death or illness of a loved one, skipping meals, reliance on stimulants like CAFFEINE and carbs, digestive problems, over-exercise, illness or infection, unresolved emotional issues from our past or present and more. The result is adrenal glands that are constantly on high alert.

In our experience, women with mild to moderate cases of adrenal fatigue can see significant improvement through these steps:
\* Dietary changes to enrich your nutrition and reduce carbohydrates and stimulants. We also recommend the addition of high-quality nutritional supplements, including essential fatty acids from fish oil.
\* Stress reduction, including moderate exercise and taking more time for yourself. It’s helpful to make a list of your stressors, especially those that are constant.
\* Get more rest. Your body needs time to heal.

Hope this helps,
Grizz

### AndrÃ©s — 2013-04-26T11:55:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-84862>

Benign prostate hyperplasia update.

After a year taking iodine/iodide, my father's prostate seems (I don't know the error margin of the echography estimation) to have shrank from 170g to 164g, at the same time that the PSA has decreased (they didn't give us the numbers though). We are not following exactly Dr. Brownstein's protocol and he has been increasing doses something like 50% every two weeks most of the times. Nowadays he is at something like 7.2mg/day (4 Iosol drops). He will be increasing toward 21.5mg/day (1 Iodoral tablet and 5 Iosol drops).

He was taking 5000IU/day of vitamin D3 for a year till last fall. His 25-OH-vitamin-D level was 61ng/ml then. He is taking 9x5000UI/week since then. We are going to measure his level again next week.

He takes also tocotrienols, tocopherols, vitamin C, vitamin B complex, selenium...

He is still taking the standard medication though: combined alpha-blocker and 5-alpha-reductase inhibitor. He was already taking it at the same dose for several years while his prostate kept growing till they advice us to operate on him last year, hence he hearing my advice and starting with iodine. We will decide to lower or eliminate it depending on next year results and medical collaboration (I would like to check size in half a year or less if eliminating). We haven't talked about iodine with his urologist yet.

@ Raiken,
The dose of iodine required for good health is extremely dependent on how much we eat & drink of the Iodine Busters
\* Chlorine
\* Fluoride
\* Bromine

If we could eliminate all of these poisons then we could get by with only 6 to 12mg of iodine daily. Unfortunately, we live in a sea of these poisons, and Dr. Brownstein recommends 50mg daily to overcome these goitrogens:
[http://www.freegrab.net/Iodine update.htm#section18](http://www.freegrab.net/Iodine%20update.htm#section18)

We have taken extreme measures to remove these toxins from our food & water including distilling our water, and we are now taking just 12mg a day (1-iodoral) with required supplements.

@ Andres
I look forward to your update on your dad's BPH. I just don't have enough [testimonials](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1KQ8tCLrOoQQJ8h_gSRM1aZ1Ya-YqaN4B3i8NMXOm8TY/edit#) on that subject. I would like to add his BPH cure to the testimonials section.

@Wurst23,
Yes, liquid iodine can react with Vitamin C where iodoral tablets are not a problem. So take your Vitamin C in the evening & your iodine in the morning. Also, I suspect that your 12% iodine is a euro version which is equivalent to the USA 5% Lugols. Euro measure iodine ratios differently than we do. What counts is the mg of iodine per drop.

@nuttmegs17,

> What is the optimol dose for Hashi people?

Here are the references for your Hashimotos. As you can see, [selenium is essentia](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_q9ixGwZFon9yidvmZ0IFbp3Vj5jXDmOp0HwpdBS6VY/edit#heading=h.8eltjvzb6ets)l:

PS) We just got back from 2 weeks vacation in Europe. Great fun, & a wonderful trip. You guys have done a great job manning this discussion thread in my absence ! This thread is becoming more professional with every message! While on vacation I managed to educate some people in our travel group to help us spread the word on iodine. One was the manager of a health care facility.

Grizz

Dr. Flechas Interview: ”Hormone Receptors and Iodine. All hormone receptors are dependent on iodine, which increases the sensitivity of the receptor to the hormone it is designed for. For example, it can increase the sensitivity of
insulin receptors and thus help with diabetes. Similarly, it can increase the sensitivity of the receptors for neurotransmitters (e.g., serotonin, dopamine, GABA) in the brain. Thus, depression may lift after taking iodine. It can also increase the sensitivity of receptors for testosterone and FSH/LH. This 2 hr interview was just one revelation after another.
This is why some people are helped with diabetes by taking iodine supplements! Also why iodine helps with low libido & hypothyroidism”
CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR OR LICENSED HEALTHCARE PROFESSIONAL.

@ GlenPDQ,

Use Lugols Liquid 5% available at Amazon.Com. Use the iodine full strength on warts, tumors & moles, but be VERY careful and do not paint your good skin. Repeated exposure to iodine will cause dermatitis in your good skin.

### Grizz — 2013-05-03T22:19:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-85393>

**The BOING Effect**

> In Lynne Farrow's new book, "The Iodine Crisis..." she describes the "boing effect". I remember that all to clearly. I started out with supplementation very slowly, basically because I did not have anyone to follow, we did not have the huge database of people that have jumped right in at 50mg or so... my point is, that I felt "the boing effect" with one drop of lugol's. I drank that lugol's sitting right here, where I am sitting now, in front of my computer. It was magic
>
> Transposed directly from the book:
>
> [www.amazon.com/Iodine-Crisis-What-About-Wreck/dp/098603200X/ref=sr\_1\_1](http://www.amazon.com/Iodine-Crisis-What-About-Wreck/dp/098603200X/ref=sr_1_1)
>
>
>
> "Within two hours of taking the 50mg of iodoral, I got a sensation some of us call "the boing". My brain cleared as if the dusty unused rooms of my brain suddenly got oxygen. My thoughts grew sharper edges. I felt a burst of energy, thought faster and felt smarter even doing everyday math. I remember getting impatient with a store clerk because he couldn't compute three times thirty two in his mind. After several tries, he pulled out a calculator. Before iodine I wouldn't have even noticed."
>
> :::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
>
> My experience with the boing effect is in the archives. The boing not only affected my mind, but my body as well. That increased clarity and energy persisted and it's been the norm for 6 years now:
>
> curezone.com/forums/am.asp

[http://curezone.com/forums/fm.asp?i=2061737#i](http://curezone.com/forums/fm.asp?i=2061737#i)

IMO, that "Boing Effect" is the brain fog lifting that many people who are severely iodine deficient discuss. I never noticed a "boing effect" when starting iodine last year. Things I did notice were my frequent urination problems faded away and my occasional erectile dysfunction began to fade away. I also noticed improved sleep and energy. Everyone is different. I may not have noticed this boing effect because I started iodine with such a very low dose of 1/2 mg and I very slowly titrated up to 50 mg over a 5 month or so period.

> I'll never forget either one:
>
> 1) I had a heart arrythmia for YEARS and YEARS; it almost killed me in late 1997. A year or two later I was diagnosed with what they called "Long QT Syndrome". It means that the hesitation between heartbeats can be dramatically too long - life threatening if TOO prolonged.
>
> On 02/Feb/2007 I had an especially-scary episode of it. (This was ONE week after learning about Iodine from Trapper on another health forum and I was Led to purchase "detoxified iodine" from iodinesource.com and had already received it and started taking it in very small doses.)
>
> Anyhoo, I had a very slow heartrate on 2/2/07, was cold to the core, and the heart arrythmia was dramatic. Still too scared to take more orally, I decided to drop 15 drops of iodine on my belly skin surrounding my naval. In less than 15 minutes I had the "boing" effect and my heartrate went from the 50's to the 80's and even higher. I believe what I felt was the iodine PUSHING the bromides out of my heart and taking it's rightful place in the valve! By bedtime my heart was back to its normal rate of the low-to-mid 70's if memory serves correctly.
>
> I STILL have NOT had any arrythmia since that scary (but WONDERFUL) day!!
>
> 2) I held a cat (my biggest alltime allergen) for a neighbor while she went scouting for her lost dog. I realized I wasn't iodinated enough when I got allergy symptoms: itchy ears, itchy nose, tightness of lungs, shortness of breath.
>
> I took ten drops of iodine orally with glass of water. Again, in less than TEN minutes this time) I had a "boing" effect, and literally felt ALL my allergy symptoms drain away - gone - finito - POOF!
>
> Nobody is EVER gonna take MY iodine away from ME!
> [http://curezone.com/forums/fm.asp?i=2061781#i](http://curezone.com/forums/fm.asp?i=2061781#i)

Here is one of the most memorable testimonials I have ever seen, by Zophie:

> Originally Posted by Zophie

Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" } [](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/tn-060-jpg.103/)
> I know I am chiming in on this post super late but I just want to thank everyone who has shared information here. Grizz, If I ever meet you in person I'm going to kiss you on the lips!
>
> After reading everything and thinking about it I decided to give iodine a try. I have had fiber cystic breasts since I was about 11 years old and I can't even tell you how uncomfortable exercising, hugging and even bras have been my whole life. I too have had 4 different doctors tell me to cut off my breasts. (and I have even thought about it) Also they told me to get a hysterectomy as soon as I was done having children to deal with the uterine fibroids.
>
> I have been taking iodine with the support supplements for just over a month. I dove right in and started with 1 drop. (now up to 4 drops) The pain in my breasts went away within 24 hours!!!! I literally did a little dance in the shower when I realized it. I still have some lumps but the smaller ones are gone. I also am getting a lot of relief from the fibroid pain.
>
> Other things I have observed is my appetite is almost completely gone, my hands don't break out from the chemicals anymore, my fingernails are hard and growing for the first time in my life, I haven't even had one migraine since starting and I am happy and have so much energy. I have suffered from depression for so long that it is amazing to feel normal again.
> So, again, thank you thank you!!

> Zophie said:
>
> Thank you both! To me this is nothing short of a real miracle. Grizz, I have read everything in your file at least 5 times, I have sent it on to my mom and sister and I tell everyone in the salon who will listen. Thank you for putting it together. The information is life changing for me.
>
> I know 11 is young... and I could have been spared 25 years of pain. I don't know if this is a common thing for girls with FB but I was that freak of nature kid who was as tall as the teacher at 9 and had a full-grown woman's body at 12. My breasts always hurt and always felt like bean bags. (and got worse over the years) I remember complaining about it when I was young and being told that it was normal for developing girls. People just thought I was complaining because I wasn't yet mature enough for the body I had. I didn't know it was FB untill I was 19 or 20 when I went in to get birth control for the first time. So I learned it was not normal but there was nothing anyone could do.
>
> I never got as far as price with the doctors so I don't know what that would cost but I was told that they could do some nice reconstructive implants at the same time. (I'm sure that doubles the price) When I chose not to do it my last doctor wanted to get me on antidepressants to "help" me deal with it. I am sure doctors just don't know about iodine. I really feel that western medicine is great at cutting stitching and fixing broken bones. They fail when it comes to restoring health to people with chronic problems. They just want to cut it out or give you a pill to mask the symptoms. No one, it seems, asks the question of what is causing the problem. That is why I am so grateful for the information you have put out there.
>
> I have two small victories to share. First, I went out yesterday to do a short run. About half way in there is a hill thats really steep that I use for my sprints. (maybe 150 yards long) I always run up but never down because of my chest and my uterus. Yesterday I flew down it with no pain at all and I was laughing so hard when I got to the bottom because I was so happy. Second, I woke up this morning and realized that I had slept on my stomach! Both of these are small things... to me, they represent the impossible.

### Grizz — 2013-05-08T23:39:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-85668>

Off Topic but still important:

**Pomegranate Found To Prevent Coronary Artery Disease Progression**

A new study published in the journal Atherosclerosis confirms that pomegranate extract may prevent and/or reverse the primary pathology associated with cardiac mortality: the progressive thickening of the coronary arteries caused by the accumulation of fatty materials known as atherosclerosis._

Blood-Pressure Lowering: Pomegranate juice has natural angiotensin converting enzyme inhibiting properties, \[iv\] and is a nitric oxide enhancer, two well-known pathways for reducing blood pressure. \[v\] Finally, pomegranate extract rich in punicalagin has been found reduce the adverse effects of perturbed stress on arterial segments exposed to disturbed flow. **Article includes scientific references - this is not BS.**

[http://www.activistpost.com/2013/05/how-to-clean-your-arteries-with-one.html](http://www.activistpost.com/2013/05/how-to-clean-your-arteries-with-one.html)

Grizz_

Jasmin,

It is not the iodine that causes detox. It is the toxins coming out of your cells being displaced by iodine that cause detox. Every cell in our body has iodine receptors that get filled with bromide, fluoride or chlorine. When iodine kicks these poisons out of our cells, we can suffer detox symptoms.

I know that bloat is on the list of detox symptoms, and is very common. However I have not yet heard of bloat in the ankles. Just to be on the safe side, go ahead and do the pulse dosing - I suggest cutting back to 1 dose per week then slowly come back to where you are now after the ankles get back to normal. All detox symptoms are temporary until the toxins have passed through the body.

Grizz

### Grizz — 2013-05-12T11:16:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-85889>

@@ Rylee & Jasmin,

IMO,
It is a waste of money to see if you are iodine deficient when you get detox symptoms. The detox symptoms alone prove you are grossly deficient. If you haven't been eating a lot of seafoods for YEARS, then you are deficient in iodine. I can say with certainty that nearly all Americans are deficient. After you have been on 50mg of iodine for a year, then it is worthwhile to get your iodine + bromide + fluoride test to verify you are finally optimal.

America is a nation of walking talking sickly people. Just sit in Walmart to watch people going in & out. Obesity, people in electric carts, pathetic Brain Washed sickly looking people are the norm. They are suffering from Big Food, Big Pharma & and starving to death on pizza, burgers & junk food. It is fun to watch what people put in their shopping carts. Junk, Junk, and more Junk. America is a $$$Bonanza$$$ for Doctors & Hospitals.

I bought a dozen books on the [iodine crises](http://www.amazon.com/The-Iodine-Crisis-About-Wreck/dp/098603200X) to give away to neighbors in my rural community. EVERY HOUSE I visited had someone in their family suffering from severe iodine deficiency symptoms. Most typically thyroid problems, painful breasts, and a shocking number of people with cancers. 30% of the houses I visited had someone visiting their Oncologist. One neighbor who had breast cancer & started iodine had her breast cancer shrink by 50% within a month of starting iodine ! Another neighbor who was sent to home hospice to die with cancer of the uterus + vagina was totally cured within 6 months of starting iodine. X-Rays proved it.

At this early stage of iodine supplementation, I think [the iodine skin patch test](http://www.utopiasilver.com/iodinetranscript.htm) is good enough. When I first started iodine, my skin patch test was GONE within 3 minutes ! ! I could literally watch the iodine fade away before my eyes. The skin stain is supposed to last for 24 hours. Whether it lasts for 24 hours or not is very controversial. The validity of the skin patch test is controversial. However I think it does have some degree of merit. When the skin patch disappears within minutes or in less than 8 hours, then yes, we are certainly proven to be more or less deficient. Use Lugols 5% iodine for this test, good enough for a ballpark test and cost a lot less than the iodine loading test.

Grizz

### Grizz — 2013-05-13T16:42:55+0300

cantweight,

Thank you for sharing with us. Clearly your organs & body are still full of toxins. Dr. Brownstein recommends titrating up to 50 mg a day with required co-supplements to rid the body of toxins. Then keep it there for a full year before dropping back to your maintenance level.
Please use this list of supplements: [http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout](http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout)

I should add that some in our group have titrated up to 100mg of iodine and have detoxed even more at that level. Some have reported more detox every time they increased their dosage. Everyone is so different. Any excess iodine just goes out in your urine, so there is nothing to worry about with 100mg. Dr. Brownstein also adds that if you suffer from any iodine related disease such as fibrocystic breasts, cancers, PCOS, uterus fibroids, then titrate up to 100mg. He advises working with an "Iodine Trained Doctor" in such cases. Listing of iodine trained doctors here: [http://breastcancerchoices.org/ipractitioners.html](http://breastcancerchoices.org/ipractitioners.html)

Dr. Brownstein recommends the one year period because toxins sometimes comes out of the body in clumps over time. The hard part is determining how much iodine to take after the one year period. If you can distill your water, and avoid ALL bromide, fluoride & chlorine, then I think you can drop back to 12 to 25mg a day. This is when the [Iodine Loading test](http://www.hakalalabs.com/testing.html) is valuable, to help us determine the correct maintenance level for iodine.

Hope this helps,
Grizz

### Ceasarea — 2013-05-13T21:38:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-85959>

Hi Grizz, I've read the entire thread, and I still have questions. I've been on Lugols 5% since March, going from less than a drop to 8 drops (50 mg) within that time. However, over the last few weeks I've had horrible problems with itchy face rashes, acne, brain-fog, irritability and more. I should mention that I'm on Iodine to remedy a fibroid (heavy periods) issue once and for all.

So I stopped taking Lugols for a couple days and my symptoms actually began to clear up (yay!) and started back yesterday with 2 drops. I think I was fine with that, however I did have some nasal moisture appear. Today I had 4 drops to see how I would react, and lo and behold some itchiness came back. So Im thinking of stopping again for a few days and resuming at 2 drops maybe next week.

I'm very frustrated. (!) I feel like I'm back to square one. My biggest concern is not ever being able to get up to 100mg level which is recommended for fibrous conditions.

What would happen if I stayed at 2 drops daily forever, would that even have any impact on the fibroids at all over the long-term? I can't find any testimonials of women who used lower levels of iodine over a long period of time. All I see are 100mg + for 3-4 months with great success. Im not sure I can handle the detox symptoms at just 50mg, I can't go to work with horrible rashes on my face, lol, it's not a good look, literally.

My last thought... I keep reading that nasal moisture signals iodine sufficiency. Does that mean that my iodine levels have maxed out throughout my body? Does that mean that I should be taking the 2 drops (12.5mg) maintenance dose indefinitely and not try to do the 100mg levels? I did a skin test in March and my patch of iodine stayed visible for what seemed like a couple days. Do those to indicators (nasal moisture and long visible patch) mean I shouldn't be upping my levels?

Thanks!!

PS- Yes, I am supplementing with Selenium, Vitamin C (in a good multi-v.), do salt loading, take Chlorella, and more. And I eat a very healthy organic vegan diet, and was raw vegan for a few years starting in 2008.

Ceasarea,

What a pretty name. Yes, you are suffering detox symptoms. Are you taking all of the required co-supplements? These are essential to help you detox. Complete list: [http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout](http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout)
I know you are anxious to get to 100mg, but you can't push it any faster than your body is able to get rid itself of the toxins being pushed out by iodine. There are no shortcuts to getting to 100mg. You can avoid detox symptoms by titrating up sloooowly.

I suggest dropping back to 12mg a day ( 2 drops ) until all of your detox symptoms have gone away. Then slowly add 1 drop of iodine per week (or even 1 drop per month). If any new symptoms appear along the way, then immediately start the Pulse Dose procedure and the salt flush procedure. (described in the link above ). Slow down and have patience. You will eventually get to 100mg detox free, and your uterus will benefit.

The iodine doctors have also recommended painting your vulva with iodine to expedite getting iodine to the uterus. After painting with iodine, follow up with grapeseed oil or coconut oil to prevent skin irritation, or else skip a few days between paintings. Iodine applied to the skin every day will cause dermatitus. One additional thought, you can also add 1 drop of iodine to your douche to help get iodine to your uterus. [http://curezone.com/forums/fm.asp?i=1022014#i](http://curezone.com/forums/fm.asp?i=1022014#i)

If you stayed at 12mg forever, that is probably not enough to overcome the sea of toxins we live in. Dr. Brownstein recommends 50mg daily to keep the toxins out of our body and since you have fibroids, I think it is worthwhile to get to 100mg daily as suggested by Dr. Brownstein.

Detox symptoms = too many cell receptors are filled with toxins instead of iodine = iodine deficiency.

IMO, you are having too many detox symptoms to be considered iodine sufficient. Also the iodine patch test is not good to indicate sufficiency. The patch test is only worthwhile to indicate insufficiency if the stain disappears too soon. There is only one test that accurately determines sufficiency, and that is the [iodine loading test](http://www.hakalalabs.com/testing.html). Also do the fluoride & bromide test to get an accurate result. However I think you should wait on this test because we know that you are still loaded with toxins.

Your nasel moisture is a good sign that you are not grossly deficient, but does not mean sufficiency. You need to get to 100mg of iodine and if that takes 6 months or a year that is fine. Painting the vulva & [iodine in the douche](http://curezone.com/forums/fm.asp?i=1022014#i) will be a big help for your uterus.

You can find a wealth of additional information by entering the search word Uterus [here at the Curezone](http://curezone.com/forums/f.asp?f=815&p=572). These people all follow the iodine doctors and are very helpful.

One last tip, when you start going above 50mg a day, it is worthwhile to start iodine several times a day to prevent a sudden spike in iodine levels in the body & spread out the effect.

Hope this helps,
Grizz

### Grizz — 2013-05-17T19:04:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-86317>

**DR. DERRY ON BREAST CANCER & IODINE**

> DrDerry said:
>
> Excerpts: Breast cancer takes around 20-30 years to develop. The discovered lump represents the end stage of slow cancer progression over decades. The longest period is the first phase of cancer development. This phase which is often called pre-cancerous happens as as a normal cell is gradually turned into a cancer cell. These pre-cancerous lesions are known as fibrocystic disease (lumpy, tender breasts) of the breast. (2-3,13-14) Most fibrocystic disease is benign, harmless and has no consequences.
>
> On the other hand, some more advanced forms of fibrocystic disease have clearly defined tendencies towards breast cancer. So there are grades of fibrocystic disease with some of the cells looking more abnormal than in the benign forms. The greater the difference in the cells from normal (abnormal) the greater chance of these cells converting to a cancer cell over 10-20 years. So if you have fibrocystic disease still at the age of 45-55, you likely have had this for many years. There maybe then a significant chance the cells may change into a cancer cell. The good news is that it can be cleared up completely with a daily intake of iodine.(9)
>
> In 1993 Ghent and Eskin (2) published a landmark paper on the treatment of severe fibrocystic disease of the breast with iodine supplements. This paper was the result of more than 30 years of marvelous research by Dr. Bernard. A. Eskin of the Medical College of Pennsylvania in Philadelphia. First in animals and then in humans he proved fibrocystic disease of the breast is the result of low dietary iodine. He has shown also that this can go on to develop into breast cancer.(2-8) I feel Dr. Eskin's research represents a major step toward conquering breast cancer and likely other cancers.
>
> From my personal investigations cancer is roughly divided into two phases. The first part is the pre-cancerous phase (before cancer) and involves the change of a normal cell into a cancer cell. This first phase of cancer development takes about 10-30 years. Iodine in adequate doses stops and reverses this stage of the cancer process by causing the natural death of abnormal cells (apoptosis). Iodine circulates throughout the body in the extracellular fluids found between the cells of the body. If cell surface proteins have the amino acid tyrosine on the outside, the passing iodine reacts with this tyrosine. This little reaction denatures the protein and thus kills the cell. It is implied all vertebrate cell membranes do not have tyrosine on the portion of the protein sticking out into the extracellular fluid.
> An adequate dose of iodine can be defined as more than 4 mg per day. Lugol's solution is an iodine-in-water solution used by the medical profession for 200 years. One drop (6.5 mg per drop) of Lugol's daily in water, orange juice or milk will gradually eliminate the first phase of the cancer development namely fibrocystic disease of the breast so no new cancers can start. It also will kill abnormal cells floating around in the body at remote sites from the original cancer. Of course this approach appears to work for prostate cancer as prostate cancer is similar to breast cancer in many respects. Indeed, it likely will help with most cancers. Also higher doses of iodine are required for inflammatory breast cancer. As well we know that large doses of intravenous iodine are harmless which makes one wonder what effect this would have on cancer growth. I hope this helps you understand breast cancer better.
>
> Much more here: [http://thyroid.about.com/library/derry/bl1a.htm](http://thyroid.about.com/library/derry/bl1a.htm)

More on [Iodine curing Cancers](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_q9ixGwZFon9yidvmZ0IFbp3Vj5jXDmOp0HwpdBS6VY/edit#heading=h.dktzefb7wyvm) here from various doctors:

PS) New [Iodine Research Website](http://iodineresearch.com/research.html)

PSS) I just talked to our neighbor with breast cancer and got some good news. She said her breast cancer is already reduced by 75% in only 1 month since starting on iodine.

Grizz

> I had some issues when I first started iodine which are kind of interesting. After going to a naturopath (too expensive and not covered under insurance) and an endocrinologist (wanted to kill, remove, or treat my thyroid with drugs that also cause many other problems) I finally started treating myself. I had started with selenium and the other supplements listed above. I didn't know about iodine yet. I also went gluten free. I got really good results from this stuff alone. My lab work looked great and continued for many months. But I was gaining weight like crazy and my goiter was still 2" big. When I started iodine I was so excited to see what my blood work looked like that I went in after only using iodine for 1 month. My lab work surprised me as it was saying I was now hypo not hyper. Destiny,
I suggest using a small spray bottle and mix 50/50 Lugols iodine & water, then spray the yeast infection daily until it is gone.
The 50/50 mix will prevent dermatitis that would be caused by applying iodine directly. You can also apply betadyne providone iodine 50/50 with water directly to the skin. I am shocked that antibiotics were used. Is the yeast infection internal in the vagina or external on the skin?

> **Antibiotics do not kill yeast.** Many women find after taking antibiotics, they get vaginal yeast infections (because their normal bacterial balance has been lost). **Antibiotics bring on fungal and yeast infections....Antibiotics kill all bacteria in the body, including the ones we need.....**
> When the "good" bacteria are killed with antibiotics, then yeast, which is part of the normal flora of the body, can begin to overgrow because the antibiotics have altered the body's healthy terrain (internal ecological balance) allowing the yeast to hyperproliferate and cause many far-reaching, toxic symptoms..... Yet topical povidone iodine (PVP-I) is as effective as topical ciprofloxacin, with a superior advantage of having no in vitro drug resistance and the added benefit of reduced cost of treatment.....Iodine - a Pillar Against Infections
>
> Iodine offers a serious and potent replacement for much of the antibiotics that are literally destroying people's lives and can be used safely with children. Parents, who chose not to dose their kids with dangerous vaccines will be glad to know that iodine can be very effective against a host of viral infections that medical officials insist threaten children.
>
> Though it kills 90 percent of bacteria on the skin within 90 seconds, its use as an antibiotic has been ignored. Iodine exhibits activity against bacteria, molds, yeasts, protozoa, and many viruses; indeed, of all antiseptic preparations suitable for direct use on humans and animals and upon tissues, only iodine is capable of killing all classes of pathogens: gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria, mycobacteria, fungi, yeasts, viruses and protozoa. Most bacteria are killed within 15 to 30 seconds of contact.
>
> **Iodine is by far the best antibiotic, antiviral and antiseptic of all time - Dr. David Derry
> **
> Dr. Derry says that iodine is effective "for standard pathogens such as Staphylococcus, but also iodine has the broadest range of action, fewest side effects and no development of bacterial resistance." There is a world of difference between using an antibiotic – anti-life substance – and an antibiotic, antiviral and antifungal substance like iodine, which is life serving because it is a basic and most necessary nutritional substance.
>
> Iodine kills single celled organisms by combining with the amino acids tyrosine or histidine when they are exposed to the extra-cellular environment. All single cells showing tyrosine on their outer cell membranes are killed instantly by a simple chemical reaction with iodine that denatures proteins. Nature and evolution have given us an important mechanism to control pathogenic life forms and we should use it and trust it to protect us in ways that antibiotics can't.
>
> "My husband Ron had a small infection at the base of the nail. This very quickly turned nasty and our doctor agreed it looked like gout. Three weeks later Ron heard back from his Doctor who was in a mad panic saying Ron had septicemia. On seeing the surgeon that same day the surgeon wanted to go in and cut the finger open end for end and look at the finger and that she would probably have to take it off anyway. Finally the Nascent Iodine we ordered arrived (my husband was refusing to take antibiotics) He started on quite a hefty dose of 15 drops while continuing to apply magnesium chloride transdermally."
>
> "Two days after starting the iodine there was feeling starting to regenerate and pain again in the finger and Ron thought it looked less discolored. Then the following day the swelling had started to go down and the normal healthy pinkness was returning at the base of the finger. Over a period of days it has progressively improved with no other treatment than the iodine and magnesium chloride. We also then made a poultice with a mixture of comfrey, honey and garlic for a few days, then the Nascent Iodine dripped into a goldenseal ointment."
>
> Magnesium chloride is the only form of magnesium known to have anti-infectious properties. When it comes to fighting infections, iodine and magnesium chloride are a dynamic duo that should not be overlooked by allopathic or naturopathic physicians or by anyone else. I talked a few months ago to a missionary in Africa who was using iodine (in the atomic or detoxified form) to successfully treat malaria. My own children have recently had bad coughs and it is iodine, not dangerous over-the-counter cough medicines I reach for..... The way to combat antibiotic resistance is not bigger, better, stronger antibiotics but, rather, no antibiotics at all.....
> Learn more: [http://www.naturalnews.com/022800\_antibiotic\_antibiotics\_infection.html](http://www.naturalnews.com/022800_antibiotic_antibiotics_infection.html)

After a course of antibiotics, supplement with acidophilis for at least a month
Eliminate sugars & fruits as it feeds candida

Let me know if this helps,
Grizz

### bennyha — 2013-05-23T19:17:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-86735>

Hey Grizz, or anyone else, these are problem stupid questions, but I was hoping you could answer them for me nonetheless.

1\. I am taking 2% Lugol's. How many drops should one take to equal the 50 mg serving so many recommend?

2\. Should you take all the drops at once, or should they be split up through the day?

3\. Is it okay if I take the Vit. C and Magnesium co-factors at night away from my iodine?

Thanks!

### Raiken3712 — 2013-05-23T20:08:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-86739>

> [bennyha said:](/goto/post?id=86735)
>
> Hey Grizz, or anyone else, these are problem stupid questions, but I was hoping you could answer them for me nonetheless.
>
> 1\. I am taking 2% Lugol's. How many drops should one take to equal the 50 mg serving so many recommend?
>
> 2\. Should you take all the drops at once, or should they be split up through the day?
>
> 3\. Is it okay if I take the Vit. C and Magnesium co-factors at night away from my iodine?
>
> Thanks!

If you're using a standard 2 ounce Lugol's bottle. One dropper or 20 drops is 50 mg.

Some people find Iodine causes them issues if taken later in the day closer to bed.

It is ok to take Vit. C and Magnesium at night separate from the Iodine. No problem there that I know of.

[http://goo.gl/XaIo4](http://goo.gl/XaIo4)

This is the supplement guide by Stephanie Buist, ND HC who is the Iodine Yahoo Group owner. The discussion group is free to join by the way if anyone wants to with a simple request. They also have an Iodine OT group for Off-topic discussions.

I really like this guide. It explains much of the same as Grizz's Iodine references but is organized differently

tinyurl.com/iodine-references.com is also good which is Grizz's

I'm not sure what the differences are in the information, but they both have good information.

### Grizz — 2013-05-24T02:06:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-86743>

Lugol’s liquid – Iodine / Potassium Iodide – 2% and 5% solutions.

2% solution is 2.5 mgs per drop. 5% solution is 6.25 mgs per drop

Grizz

### bennyha — 2013-05-24T15:34:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-86789>

Thank you guys.

One last quick question.

Should it all be taken at once, or broken up throughout the day? If broken up, how many times per day?

Thanks again

### Grizz — 2013-05-24T22:38:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-86803>

> [bennyha said:](/goto/post?id=86789)
>
> Thank you guys.
>
> One last quick question.
>
> Should it all be taken at once, or broken up throughout the day? If broken up, how many times per day?
>
> Thanks again

There is only one restriction. If taking Lugols, you should wait a few hours before taking your vitamin C. It is best to take Vitamin C in the evening, it helps some sleep better. If you take Lugols with Vitamin C, it will convert iodine into iodide.

This conversion does not happen if you are taking iodoral.

Otherwise you can take everything at one time.

There is another restriction... If you are taking more than 50mg iodine a day, you should spread the doses out during the day.
Cases when you may want to take more than 50mg a day is when you are fighting cancer or serious deficiency disease such as FBD, PCOS, Uterus problems.

Grizz

### Lava — 2013-05-24T23:30:37+0300

Does anyone ever use Atomidine?

### Grizz — 2013-05-25T00:08:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-86810>

> [Lava said:](/goto/post?id=86806)
>
> Does anyone ever use Atomidine?

**Not Recommended**

> i. Nascent (aka Magnascent, Detoxified, or **Atomidine**) – Based on
> Edgar Cayce’s “energized” iodine. The iodine is reduced to a 1% concentration in 100% ethyl alcohol and electro-magnetically transmuted (while
> being suspended in a wet bath containing a mild acid solution) into the
> Atomic state. 1 drop = 150 microgram (mcg) or .150 mg of Iodine. This
> form will not saturate body tissues and has not been proven to detox
> halides such as bromide, fluoride, chloride, and mercury, as other forms
> have. This form of iodine is not recommended on this protocol as the goal
> is tissue saturation and halide detoxification / protection.
>
> ii. Iosol – 1830 mcg / drop of Iodine only – this form of iodine is not
> recommended. It is microgram dosages and has the same issues that
> Nascent iodine (above) has.
>
> iii. Prolamine (Standard Process) – This product has 3 mgs Iodine and 20
> mgs of Calcium. The iodine dosage in this product is too low to
> adequately detox the body from halides or saturate the tissues of the
> body.
>
> iv. Pure Encapsulations, Solray, Source Naturals, Progressive Labs
> [http://home.comcast.net/~jocy1/junk/The Guide to Supplementing with Iodine.pdf](http://home.comcast.net/~jocy1/junk/The%20Guide%20to%20Supplementing%20with%20Iodine.pdf)

Grizz

### Grizz — 2013-05-27T17:44:22+0300

Raiken,

IMO, your #1 priority should be to lose weight and eliminate junk foods. I suggest you go on a strict Paleo Diet and read the book, "Wheat Belly." This book will help motivate you to eliminate the junk that is ruining your body. See this website:
[http://www.wheatbellyblog.com/](http://www.wheatbellyblog.com/)

Vitamin & mineral pills cannot overcome the damage being done to your body by a terrible diet, lack of exercise & obesity. If you wish to see optimal health, it will require following a strict Paleo diet first, then you can take the supplements [recommended by Dr. Brownstein](http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout):

A key component in Paleo is adequate exercise. Your body includes TWO liquid systems. One is your blood supply system that is pumped by your heart. The other is your lymphatic system. This is the system of sewer pipes that carries sewage out of your cells and contains more liquid than you have blood. There is no heart to pump this sewage. Instead you must exercise to move this sludge through your lymphatic veins. Each vein includes one way valves that move the fluid in one direction only when your muscles flex. If you don't flex your muscles enough with exercise, these poisons in your lymphatic system start building up to make you VERY SICKLY. Pills & doctors cannot help you here. It is for YOU to exercise enough to stimulate your lymphatic system.

I think Dr. Kruse will agree with my advice. Please review the many excellent Dr. Kruse files toward optimal health. If you follow Dr. Kruse advice in his many files, he will change your life.

Grizz

I think my depression is an inflammatory phenomenon related to MS - I am a Clinical Psychologist and I know I don't have the kind of dysfunctional thinking patterns which generate psychogenic depressions. I would like to wean off now that I have learned about bromide but I need to find something else to replace its anti inflammatory effects - I am wondering whether St John's Wort or bupropion hydrochloride (Wellbutrin) might be alternatives.

But you are doing a LOT more. You are arming your immune system with the proven power to kill off any and all cancers. Iodine kills cancer cells by a process called Apoptosis. You are also preventing all the normal female diseases caused by iodine deficiency:
Fibrocystic Breasts - swollen painful lumps & bumps that are typically a prelude to breast cancer
PCOS - swollen & painful ovaries, sometimes as large as an orange
Uterus Problems & related horrific menstrual cycles including endometriosis
Thyroid nodules, swollen thyroid, and thyroid cancers
Brain Fog
Depression
Dry skin problems
Dry eye problems
Stomach acid problems

I'm also helping a man who called me yesterday suffering with terminal out of control raging cancer. He was given less than 1 month to live by the doctors. I sent him our iodine files and it will be a miracle from heaven if he survives. We've already cured one raging cancer patient who was sent to home hospice to die. She fully recovered and is now cancer free on the Dr. Brownstein Iodine Protocol:
[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IzFKo-r2-Nn8\_z0KUrOhHdlanzSuhkuV3QO03XF6YTY/edit#](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IzFKo-r2-Nn8_z0KUrOhHdlanzSuhkuV3QO03XF6YTY/edit#)

So now it is great to have a local health food store help me with this iodine project. Author Lynne Farrow thinks that Tennessee has become "Ground Zero" in the iodine movement. This model can be duplicated all over the country. Visit your local health food store and see if you can get them to join us.

PS) I would LOVE to hear what your doc says when you tell him that Iodine cured your thyroid! Please do post this conversation for us. Ask him why he didn't prescribe iodine for you.

Iodine is a miracle from God,

[http://www.candidamd.com/candida/symptoms.html](http://www.candidamd.com/candida/symptoms.html)

Here are my thoughts:
\* NO sugars in your diet, this means no bread, alcohol, soda pop, ice cream or other foods high in carbs or sugars.
\* **_Absolutely no anti-biotics_**
\* Yes iodine will help
\* Getting rid of mercury a big help

I think your dumping mercury over the past 3 months may be temporarily stirring up more candida but will help get rid of it. Candida overgrowth begins in the body due to exposure to antibiotics, chlorine, alcohol, mercury, or other things that either kill normal bacterial flora, suppress normal immunity or provide too much fungal nourishment. If we were standing face to face right now, i would be checking your mouth like a guy buying a horse. got fillings? Tuna and other sea products over time, living near a coal fired power plant, broken fluorescent bulbs, thermometers and thermostats that were not properly remediated in home or at work, vaccinations, use of mercury preparations on cuts and wounds, etc, and etc. its almost as bad as fluoride. one can never know when they are exposed either.

The reason i mention this is that candida is really stubborn in the presence of mercury. in the continued exposure to it, it is impossible to get rid of.

Here is the best resource on Planet Earth for you: The Curezone

I discontinued Facebook, a long story, but in any event, here is the message for those who might like facebook:

> Iodine Research.com has created a new CLOSED Facebook group to exchange information on iodine supplementing. The Iodine Workshop group will serve as a companion group to the other online Iodine Forum s but will reflect an additional perspective.
>
> We hope you can join us at [https://www.facebook.com/groups/309122002556036/](https://www.facebook.com/groups/309122002556036/)
>
> Because the group is closed your posts will only show up among group members and not go into your personal facebook feeds.
>
> Feel free to join us!
>
> Lynn Razaitis
> IodineResearch.com

**Why did you close the group to members only?**

> Why did we "close" the facebook group instead of leave it open? There are a lot of people who use facebook liberally but don't want what personal medical information going to all their friends (like their boss, co-workers or some family members). We realize facebook information can't be searched on since it's not archived like this group and other yahoo groups. But since so many people love using facebook it's another way to reach more people. It's totally public to anyone with a facebook account who asks to join just not to all their friends not in this group. Hope this helps make sense....and a big thanks for your concern.

Grizz

### prAna303 — 2013-06-18T21:38:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-88365>

Doing it from a different point of view.

After a weekend with a big amounts of tests i suggested that i should treat myself some iodine but not to cure illness but to enhance my senses. I have done some testing where i have been compared to some people that are rockstars of their branch and i suggested this little adventure.

The main thing for me is to sense the thing i love most in a more deeper way and what i found is nothing short of amazing.

Day one i simply took a dose, nothing much. I thought it would just spice things up a little because i eat seafoods and seaweeds everyday and have done that for years. All i can say is wow, in just a couple of hours everything was hyper clear, sounds, smells all my senses where on top of this world. The funny thing was that i had a concert booked that night, classical. I could really zoom in on every detail of the music, audience and the place. The weird thing was that i was asked for a coffee date of one girl sitting next to me. She told me she never seen someone absorbing a piece of art like i did.

Day two, still extremly sharp direct in the morning. I could look at people pass by and almost see everything about them. Still on my daily trip i felt almost high. The mountains felt extra nice this day and the sea later on was magic.

Soon to start day three with this little experiment and in the near future some tests to see if anything else has changed.

e. Optional â€“ ATP CoFactors -1 tablet 2x / day â€“ when individuals continue to feel
fatigued or have autoimmune thyroid disease this product can assist in
increasing ATP (energy) within the cells. Riboflavin and no-flush niacin.

Many people with chronic illnesses, such as fibromyalgia, chronic fatigue syndrome, and autoimmune
disorders, complain they have no energy. ATP is the molecule that stores energy for the body. The
body is constantly producing and utilizing ATP. Its production is a complex process that is beyond
this book. However, there are two cofactors, Vitamins B2 (riboflavin) and B3 (niacin), that are integral
to stimulating oxidative phosphorylation and ATP production.....

### Kiera2 — 2013-06-23T00:04:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-88683>

> See this iodine guide for more:
> [http://steppingstonesliving.com/downloads/](http://steppingstonesliving.com/downloads/)

**Grizz, Trey's iodine is not close to 5% at all.** In the article linked, Stephanie says:

Lugolâ€™s liquid â€“ Iodine / Potassium Iodide â€“ 2% and 5% solutions.
2% solution is 2.5 mgs / drop. 5% solution is 6.25 mgs / drop.

The JCrows dosing advice says: LUGOL'S 2%: Slightly less than 1/2 half the (5%) above measurements.[http://jcrow.com/calculating.html](http://jcrow.com/calculating.html)

My lugol's is 5% Iodine & 10% Iodide = 6.25mg/drop
Trey's lugol's is 2% Iodine & 4% Iodide = 2.5mg/drop

LinD: Holding the dropper vertically, with the glass tube pointing straight down gives a smaller drop. Vertical drops are 6.25mg per each single drop.

HORIZONTAL drops - with the dropper held side to side are twice as much - 12.5 mg Iodine per drop. How do we know? We measured, a couple times. Why?? Because some of us wanted to know how many drops of iodine are in an ounce bottle. Several of us found out then that we were taking twice the amount of iodine that we thought - because we were using horizontal drops. [http://curezone.com/faq/q.asp?a=13,281,2962&q=559](http://curezone.com/faq/q.asp?a=13,281,2962&q=559)

### Kiera2 — 2013-06-25T02:27:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-88861>

For anyone in Australia, the cheapest source of Iodine is at your local chemist. If they don't have it on the shelf they can order it in for you.

It's also available online:
[http://www.chempro.com.au/IODINE-SOLN-AQ-LUGOL-100ML-DC](http://www.chempro.com.au/IODINE-SOLN-AQ-LUGOL-100ML-DC)
[http://www.homepharmacy.com.au/products/products\_view.cfm?ProductID=7958](http://www.homepharmacy.com.au/products/products_view.cfm?ProductID=7958)

There are other sources of Lugol's online in Australia, but they are compounding pharmacies or alternative health product suppliers, and they are a ripoff! It seems that if it's called 'Lugol's' is going to cost you a lot more than if it's just plain old iodine. But it's exactly the same product. Just pay attention to the % and the price per 100ml.

for men with prostate problems and for women with uterus/ovary problems.

**HOW TO MAKE A PROSTATE/UTERUS IODINE SUPPOSITORY**

Use these plastic disposable [suppository molds](http://shop.tps-online.com/browse.cfm/suppository/2,318.html) to make your suppositories,

@@Inger,
YES ! Lugols Iodine will completely remove moles & nasty skin lesions, leaving fresh, new skin, like magic. I've done this myself. However it is very important to keep the iodine on the mole/lesion and don't let it smear onto your good skin. If necessary get help from another person to keep the iodine on the mole and not on your good skin. Apply iodine 2 x daily and within a month the mole will scab over, begin to itch and will fall off leaving fresh, new skin.

Your plan to start iodine looks good. Sloooowly titrate up to 50mg daily, plan on taking at least 3 to 6 months to get there. The poisons of fluoride, bromide & chlorine take months to detox, and cannot be rushed with one or more nasty detox symptoms.

@@Honeychild,

### caroline — 2013-07-01T10:43:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-89285>

Grizz - I am at 50mg with no detox symptoms at all ..... I actually got there pretty quickly accidentally. Should I titrate up do you think - or stay at 50mg for awhile? It is unusual to not have any detox?

Thanks for all the work that you do here and elsewhere I am sure....

### Grizz — 2013-07-02T03:58:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-89341>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=89285)
>
> Grizz - I am at 50mg with no detox symptoms at all ..... I actually got there pretty quickly accidentally. Should I titrate up do you think - or stay at 50mg for awhile? It is unusual to not have any detox?
>
> Thanks for all the work that you do here and elsewhere I am sure....

Caroline,

Dr. Brownstein recommends that you stay at 50 mg daily for maintenance. The exception being if you have a deficiency disease such as:
\* Fibrocystic Breasts
\* Ovary cysts
\* Uterus problems such as fibroids or endo
\* Cancers of any kind
Then you should boost your intake to 50mg 2 times a day.

As an added note, that recommendation of 50 mg daily assumes you are being bombarded by toxins every day from fluoride, bromide, & chlorine. If you eliminate fluoride from water, bromide from breads & flour products and read labels to try and eliminate other sources, then Dr. Brownstein says you can drop down to 6 to 25mg daily.

You can buy bromide free bread, and you can distill water to remove fluoride, and carful reading of labels can eliminate other sources, such as certain brands of Soda Pop.

It is unusual to start with 50 mg of iodine without any detox symptoms. However, detox symptoms can come weeks or even months later. It takes time to detox the trillions of cells in your body.

Grizz

### Grizz — 2013-07-03T20:00:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-89455>

**Iodine Protects Against Breast Cancer**
Iodine is an overlooked mineral, yet its importance to overall health and well being cannot be overstated. Iodine is critical for the formation of thyroid hormone. People who have difficulty losing weight even though they eat small portions of health promoting foods are probably short on iodine. Iodine deficiency can lead to dull brittle hair, balding, lack of skin tone, low energy levels, difficulty dealing with environmental temperature change, poor concentration, constipation, depression, and extreme fatigue. And there is one more manifestation of low iodine. Scientists now believe that iodine deficiency plays a role in the development of breast cancer.
The rest of this article:
[http://curezone.com/forums/fm.asp?i=2080465#i](http://curezone.com/forums/fm.asp?i=2080465#i)

**Iodine can prevent or help cure breast cancer**
Iodine has been determined to actually alter breast cancer associated gene expressions. It turns off cancer promoting genes and turns on genes that promote cancer cell apoptosis or cellular destruction.

Learn more: [http://www.naturalnews.com/041059\_iodine\_breast\_cancer\_trace\_minerals.html](http://www.naturalnews.com/041059_iodine_breast_cancer_trace_minerals.html)

### Grizz — 2013-07-11T21:03:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-89903>

Dextery is correct on all counts.

Please see this list of Detox Symptoms.
[http://tinyurl.com/Detox-Help](http://tinyurl.com/Detox-Help)
You will find your detox symptoms listed.

Pulse Dosing to clear the kidneys
Pulse dosing of iodine has often helped our participants with detox symptoms: taking a 48 hour break from iodine supplementation as needed enhances the kidneys' ability to excrete bromide and other toxins. Continue with the co-supplements.

If doing the Salt Flush and Pulse Dosing does not help, then go back to 1 drop a day and slowly titrate back up to your current dose. You may have to take 3 months for this, because it takes time to get rid of all the toxins built up in your cells over time. Some in our program have taken an entire year to titrate up to the 50mg recommended dosage.

Please review this doc to be sure you are taking all of the required co-supplements:
[http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout](http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout)

You might also try the iodoral tablets that break down in the lower gut, if your digestive system does not like Lugols.
Tablets are also not affected by Vitamin C as Dex explained.

### Grizz — 2013-07-11T21:11:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-89904>

**Exciting Interview at CheeseSlave**
Interview with Lynne Farrow, Author of The Iodine Crisis (Part 1)
This is part one of a two-part interview.

Lynne Farrow is the author of the important new book, [The Iodine Crisis: What You Don’t Know About Iodine Can Wreck Your Life.](http://www.amazon.com/The-Iodine-Crisis-About-Wreck/dp/098603200X/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&qid=1373565986&sr=8-1&keywords=iodine+crises)

Lynne answered some of my questions about the book and her experience recovering from breast cancer with iodine in this two-part interview.

### GlenPDQ — 2013-07-13T18:27:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-90052>

Iodide symporter

I have heard that patient outcomes in hospitals are better when vitamin C bolus is administered. Maybe this is for emergency room patients or surgery patients, I don't remember. It seems to be poo-poo'd by many in mainstream medicine. However, I am starting to connect some dots since I found that white blood cells use the iodide symporter to concentrate iodide to destroy bacteria through phagocytosis. Guess what? _Vitamin C is one of several things which promote the iodide symporter_ according to Dr. Fletchas' video.

WBC's can use both thyroxin and iodide for phagocytosis. Since chronic infections use up thyroxin faster than normal, it makes sense that we need to take in more iodide.

### Grizz — 2013-07-15T12:15:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-90133>

**Is Iodine the Fountain of Youth?**
(Part 1)

96% of Americans are deficient in iodine. This means YOU!

The consumption of iodine has decreased 50% in the last 30 years. Various additives in food, tap water, medicines and consumer products actually push iodine out of the body creating an even greater deficiency.
Iodine deficiency creates dozens and dozens of symptoms. This includes high cholesterol, high blood pressure, depression, recurring infections, weight gain, fatigue, asthma, ADHD and constipation.
The pharmaceutical industry is dependent on you being deficient of iodine.
There are 181 symptoms of possible iodine deficiency. Before you let anyone prescribe a pharmaceutical drug to “fix” any of these you need to make sure a simple nutrient is not really what’s missing.
Iodine was put into supplement form in 1829 by a Frenchman named Dr. Lugol. This formula still exists today and is known as Lugol’s solution. It is considered to be the first “Western medicine” ever. It was used to shrink enlarged thyroids (goiters), cure hyperactive and underactive thyroids, and shrink tumors (cancer) of the thyroid, breast and prostate. By 1956, there were 1,700 different iodine preparations. It was used as a panacea since it fixes almost everything!
The drug companies started to attack it in the 1960s. Now you can’t even get it at a pharmacy! Also, medical schools started teaching their students that iodine is harmful but this is simply not true.
Why has this deception continued? It’s because drug companies make money on this falsehood. It’s not just a little bit of money- it’s a cornerstone of their total income!
[http://www.thenutritionalhealingcenter.com/is-iodine-the-fountain-of-youth-part-one/](http://www.thenutritionalhealingcenter.com/is-iodine-the-fountain-of-youth-part-one/)

[Exciting conclusion, Part 2](http://www.thenutritionalhealingcenter.com/iodine-the-fountain-of-youth-part-two/#.UTGp-eyAuMw.twitter)

Grizz

### Dextery — 2013-07-16T02:22:14+0300

> Dex ..... are you going to stay at 100mg? I am using about 8 drops and have no side effects.....altho - I am not sure how accurate my drops are - some drops seem to be bigger than others. Is there a better way? maybe I am not getting as much as I think I am.....

I went to 150mg and no side effects. I make sure my dropper is full and I hold it vertical when I squeeze out the drops. There is an iodine workshop thread on Facebook in which many ladies start having severe detox symptoms at 1 drop. Others titrate up from one drop to 20 drops over 4 months and do well. I am sure these ladies all eat SAD and are all hypothyroid. Anyone can join. It is a closed group so no one outside the group sees anyone's postings. [https://www.facebook.com/groups/309122002556036/](https://www.facebook.com/groups/309122002556036/)

During the early part of the 1900s, I guess people were taking 200-300mg daily of Lugol's without problems. It was quite common....but that was way before the body was being inundated with bromine, chlorine, fluorine that now displaces the iodine from the T3 hormone.

I gather that the more of these halides the body has, the worst the side effects are.

The way I take mine is I put 25 drops in a half gallon of water and have that drunk within 1.5 hours of waking up after BAB and then I have another half gallon of plain distilled water in the next 3 hours and then I have no need/desire for water until the next morning. Skin is silky smooth and soft. It is like I do not have any fingerprints as the skin on my hands is plumped where my fingerprints should be. They are there but not as pronounced.

### Grizz — 2013-07-16T11:48:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-90222>

My son asked if I had any testimonials about iodine helping in leukemia. Unfortunately I don't. A friend of his had terminal leukemia and would die any day.
[http://tinyurl.com/iodine-testimonials](http://tinyurl.com/iodine-testimonials)

I asked Lynne Farrow, author of [The Iodine Crises](http://www.amazon.com/The-Iodine-Crisis-About-Wreck/dp/098603200X/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&qid=1373614618&sr=8-1&keywords=iodine+crises) if there was any hope using iodine for leukemia.

Lynne said, "We're getting results from people we can't figure out such as the [Myasthenia Gravis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Myasthenia_Gravis) patient who felt the results almost immediately. Even her vision improved. So if someone has leukemia, a bottle of Lugol's seems like a nothing to lose situation."

In the case of our neighbor with terminal cancer, I felt the situation to be hopeless, but we tried the iodine protocol anyway and she was completely cured. So bottom line, if in doubt go ahead with iodine. It can't hurt and the miracle results can be unexpected. The [Pandoras Box of disease](http://www.oasisadvancedwellness.com/learning/iodine-deficiency-under-recognized-epidemic.html) caused by iodine deficiency is still not fully known.

Grizz

> A dear friend of mine has been getting me in the know and I believe it is changing the lives of those around me! We went into it with "what do I have to loose?" and now, "wow, did it get rid of the cancer?" What do any of us have to loose trying to go to natural remedies?
>
>
> She had started out with cancer of the uterus in 2000 and then it returned all over her in 2002 she was told it couldn't go in remission but did! Then almost 3 years ago it returned in a tumor that closed off her urine flow so she had to have a cath at all times. We started the iodine therapy one year ago, and within two months her urine flow was going past the cath so we wondered about the cancer's progress. She had been placed on Hospice, so we had to get her off of it before any test could be done. This was finally done in February! Nothing shows up except a 4 cm "spot" on her pubic bone. The bladder scan and pap test were done with no signs of cancer!
>
>
> This was what happened with her only up to 50mgs of iodine and I maintaining that.
>

> I had been diagnosed with fibrocystic breast disease in 1986. With every Mammogram I have done, I have to return for additional test because of what they see. I started the Iodine Therapy along with my friend in June, 2012. Within two months, my lumps and soreness was gone! I remain at 12.5 mg., and I will continue taking this untill somebody shows me a reason to quit!

Iodine miracles from little Yuma in West Tennessee,

Meghan,
I prefer that you follow the Dr. Brownstein Protocol exactly as it is written. A great many years of research and many thousands of patients were treated with this protocol.
[http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout](http://tinyurl.com/Iodine-Handout)

If you start with more than 1 drop of Lugols you are extremely likely to suffer nasty detox symptoms that will keep you home from work and make you miserable. Plan on sloooowly titrating up to 50mg over at least 3 months. Some even find it necessary to take an entire year. It depends on how toxic you are.

You can mix iodoral & Vitamin C but you must take Lugols and Vitamin C at least 2 hours apart. Do your lugols in the AM and your Vit C in the evening.

Selenium is a co-requisite of iodine. You cannot take one without the other, or you can get very sick from thyroid problems. So yes, you must take your selenium. This is why iodine gets such a bad rap. People take iodine by itself and wonder why their thyroid gets sick.

Then the question is how much selenium & vitamin D3 are you taking. Most folks don't take nearly enough. So I say follow doctors orders to the letter and you won't be disappointed. You can stop taking the ATP cofactors after 1 year.

Grizz

### Grizz — 2013-07-17T09:33:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-iodine-thread.943/post-90270>

Meghan,

Not everyone is so toxic that they need to start with 1 drop or less of Lugols. Some have even been able to start with 50mg a day of iodoral. Everyone is so different.
Here are the detox symptoms list, so that if you get sick, you can quickly check for your symptoms.
[http://tinyurl.com/Detox-Help](http://tinyurl.com/Detox-Help)
When you get sick on 1/2 of an iodoral, then you know you need Lugols. The most common symptoms are pimples, skin rash, bloat & headache. The WORST is cherry angiomas which are nearly impossible to get rid of.

You can get your selenium from 3 Brazil nuts a day or from a can of sardines a day. You can skip the ATP Cofactors if you find no detox symptoms.

Iodine doctors list:
[http://breastcancerchoices.org/ipractitioners.html](http://breastcancerchoices.org/ipractitioners.html)
More doctors listed here:
[http://tinyurl.com/iodine-references](http://tinyurl.com/iodine-references)

I suggest following the Dr. Brownstein protocol, it only costs only about $1 a day on average. That is affordable for most of us. You need most of those vitamins anyway. Why risk suffering the consequences?

Grizz

Blood tests & saliva are not accurate for iodine. You should do the iodine loading test. If you do this also do the bromide & fluoride test:
[http://www.hakalalabs.com/testing.html](http://www.hakalalabs.com/testing.html)

@@Meghan

Yes, but not nearly enough.
