### vkiernan — 2012-04-26T21:01:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-19107>

April 26th

Spend the 25th traveling. Yesterday was a baaad day. Fought with dh who was a total jerk to me. I know he doesn't get what I am going thru otherwise he might be a bit more understanding. Need that appt. soon with Dr. K or I fear the worst.

I am tired today as well as the last few. I think I shouldn't go anywhere outside the norm until I get fixed. I can't keep up the pace and it wears heavily on me but could also be part pms. This month so far is not normal. Time might tell!

My stomach has not been good and now it seems worse. Don't know whether to take HCL or not. So, backing off to see what happens. Only took 2 this am and none for lunch. Ate an omelet for breakfast Wednesday and didn't eat the rest of the day.

Didn't get hungry either. Thinking it is due to stomach issues. I did eat a lot of food Mon and Tues. cuz it was there (bad reason for sure). I'm thinking I have an eating problem. When it is in front of me, I eat it even if I am full. How sad is that. I had a little fruit and more salad than I would normally eat along with the protein. May have exasperated the stomach issues. Cutting way back and keeping it simple for a while.

HC continuing with 12.5, 10 & 5. Upped for a few days while in CA due to the time change and really tired. But dropped it back down yesterday.

I did sleep 7 hours fairly straight thru except where dh wakes me and rolls me over. I did fall right back asleep though so that was positive. Probably cuz I was in my own bed.

HCL 2 with BAB and 3 enzymes

Preg. out of my normal preg from doc, so using some I had which is 100 mg first thing in the am instead of 30 or 40 that I was taking am and noon per my doc. Need to order some as I don't see her for a few weeks.

Supps all the same

DHEA 25 mg

### vkiernan — 2012-04-28T04:51:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-19514>

April 27th

Today was a much better day for me and it was probably due to getting some sleep. Strangely, I slept fairly well last night. DH tossed and turned and flipped me a few times but I actually fell right back asleep and didn't get out of bed until 6:15 after crawling into bed at 9:30. No mental issues today either although I do have a headache this evening. Should be pms but nothing so far.

I just want to mention that I hurt both my feet walking barefoot in the sand at the ocean on Sunday. The pain is straight down from the outside of my ankles to the bottom of my feet. They still hurt today so I am assuming it is not muscle soreness but a sort of strain. I have struggled all week trying to walk. It has been that bad.

Did my CT this evening after not having done it the last 4 days. It was very tough but after reading CT 11 I felt compelled and really forced myself to do it. I only lasted 30 minutes but at least the water was around 53. I will do it again tomorrow and Sunday no matter what. The weather is supposed to be crappy so I have no excuse and also since my feet hurt so bad I can't really do anything else anyway.

Still eating fairly light. Hungry for supper early though. Stomach is feeling a tad better this afternoon. Still kinda nauseated this morning a bit. Didn't take any betaine HCL today, just enzymes.

HC 12.5, 10 & 7.5 (upped 3rd dose to see if it messes with my sleep, probably shouldn't change it yet but curious)

Preg. 100 mg am

Dhea 25 mg am

Supps all the same d3, k2, c, DIM, silymarin & mag (at night)s

Thinking about adding Maca again as Dr. K. says it increases progesterone and I know I need it. Might work this time cuz I think I dumped a bunch of estrogen due to CT a few weeks ago.

### vkiernan — 2012-04-28T06:30:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-19525>

This post is why I believe I am in the situation I am today. A lot of this overlapped.

Brief history, started out as a shy girl with 2 sisters and 4 brothers all living at home in a 2 bedroom house with parents who's jobs had them gone a lot. There wasn't much discipline happening either. Older sister sort of raised us. Not good. Mom was a great cook and we ate well; well at least taste wise. We always had ice cream or cookies or anything all sugary and yummy. Needless to say, baaad food. Mom didn't know and neither did we that we were killing ourselves slowly. I ate like this my whole life until the Atkin's Diet around 33 yrs old or so in 1996.

I eventually got married to a very strict catholic in which I turned catholic at 19 (1982) to marry him. Had 3 beautiful babes all weighing 9 ish lbs. I gained and lost 30 with the first 2 and gained 50 with the last and couldn't lose it all until many many years later going on the atkins diet as noted above. Don't know what changed between baby #2 and #3 but something did. I was grateful for Dr. Atkins as his protocol at the time worked great for me. I know better now but the weight did come off. As for the ex husband, he was tough on us all in many ways. He was also the type of person who's glass was only half full. Never any praise for any one of us. Vacation, what's that. Can't ever spend any money you know either.

In 1992, my youngest was 4 and I decided I had better go to school to get a job when he would go off to kindergarten since I was a stay-at-home mom. We needed the cash. This was the start of my additional stress (married to the wrong man). Fast forward 1 year, I graduated and got a job. Decided after a couple of years that I needed more schooling due to my job. So, fought with the hubby to go back to school. After he said no repeatedly, I just did what I needed to do and went back. So, working a full-time job with 3 little kids and a husband and taking 3 classes a semester was taking it's toll. Somehow I managed to do this for many years until obtaining my associates in Accounting and graduating in 1998 with a 3.96/4.0 gpa. Stayed with the same company and moved up until a better job came along Dec. 1999. The company I had been working for since day 1 was going thru rough times (I knew this when taking the job) and eventually went under after many changes thruout the years. About a year after I left, they were gone so ultimately it was a good decision to change jobs when I did.

Fast forward to 2000, my oldest brother was diagnosed with lung cancer. This moved to his brain and killed him the next year or so. Fast forward another year, my Mom had been ill for a very long time with heart disease, diabetes and congestive heart failure on and off. She had her carrotids cleaned out and eventually also had bypass surgery. One time she got so sick and ended up in the hospital with something that led to kidney failure. This meant she had to have dialysis and eventually she just couldn't have it anymore and she died in 2002. During this time, I ended up leaving my husband for about 6 months. Things were not good and he felt he had nothing to work on and seeing a counselor was not going to help.

Back to the new job; it was good until my current boss left in 2001 and I got a new boss. We clashed big time. This was a huge stressor on me and he remained my boss until 2008. During this time, I ended up leaving my husband again for 2 years and finally divorcing in 2006. My kids were mad at me and even came to my work one day to chew me out. Ouch! Never want to go thru that again.

I eventually met a new man and ended up working for him part time doing his bookkeeping (married him in 2009). I was still working fulltime at my other job as well. After a bit, they switched software packages and I ended up working a lot of nights until 10 pm or later from starting at 8 am. I had to figure out the accounting portion and how this was going to work with the new software. Brain and energy overload. This was everwhelming and I finally crashed. That was probably the last thing to lead to my adrenal fatigue. I remember going on a Hawaiian cruise in 2007 and fell asleep during a luau in the front row. I was always falling asleep. I would sit on the couch in the evening and just fall asleep. If we drove somewhere, I would fall asleep; just couldn't stay away for anything. Even in work meetings if they turned down the lights, I would fall asleep. I didn't know what was wrong with me at time but had a clue shortly down the road. I ended up going to acupuncture for a lot of stomach issues after talking with a friend who led me to her and she led me to a nutritionist who told me I had adrenal fatigue. She put me on this crazy high protein, low carb diet that I couldn't continue on and I stopped the diet and blew it off (wish I wouldn't have). This was early 2009.

There you have it, Adrenal fatigue in the making. The above are the "highlights" that I believe caused a big part of my health issues along with my really crappy diet. Who knew sugar and high 06's could kill you or at least make you very sick. I just thought I might get fat. Even though I had been low carb for years (ever since following Atkins), I believe the damage was already done. I also believe I have had estrogen dominance most of my life as well due to really bad TOM's forever. It is too bad I didn't take that nutritionist more serious and have this really looked into. I might have been better years ago. Funny how Dr. K came into the picture when he did.

### vkiernan — 2012-04-29T16:03:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-19765>

Yeh, successful or at least for me as I can see it. Wonder how to show the pic all the time. Back to the drawing board.

OK, can't make it work to show it as I don't know how to upload the pic to the forum it seems.

April 28th & 29th, Saturday & Sunday

Saturday was a good day overall and I am sleeping and feeling better. DH is still waking me but I can go right back to sleep and I am NOT, I repeat NOT, staying awake in the middle of the night. Man this is great! I am so pleased and hoping it continues. I even took a 2 hr nap yesterday morning. Totally unheard of. No mental issues yesterday or today. Yippee!

Thinking about getting my CT over for today. Will have to go quickly though as BAB won't last forever. Yesterday's CT was better than the day before but I still cannot go longer than 40 min. max. I am putting the arms in and the watering the girls with a cup. I know this impacts it. If I bundle up the upper half I can go longer. So, what is better - longer or more skin exposed to CT?

Started a new thread today about digestion and the stomach gurgles. This happens to me when I CT and when I eat. Wondering if it is good, bad or otherwise.

My ankles are finally starting to feel a little better. Have to wear 1 pair of shoes that keeps them in the right position though.

So it is now 4:30 pm and I need to report that I am hungry today. Hungry for BAB, lunch and dinner. One of those days I guess. I also did my CT this morning with arms and girls included. Couldn't last more than 30 min. Booh. Really wanted to but was shivering too much. Really have the girgles all day long.

Sat and Sun supps:

HC 12.5, 10 & 7.5

DHEA 25 mg and Preg. 100 mg in the early am

Armour 2 gr. took in early am instead of 9:30 am. Will try that for awhile as it is easier to remember to take.

L-glutamine - read yesterday that I should be taking this on a empty stomach so will try before BAB and after lunch.

Supps. D3, Bcomplex, DIM, Silymarin, Kyolic garlic - adding back in for Candida, got a sniffly nose - detox or Candida?

2 HCL and 2 enzymes - testing the HCL as I am still not sure if I need it or not, posted a new thread trying to make head or tails of it.

### vkiernan — 2012-04-30T14:55:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-20044>

April 30th, Monday

Wow! Another great night of sleep. OMG, this is so great and I still can't believe it. Even DH slept much better last night which of course helped me sleep. I feel human when I wake up now. Still no pms. Don't know what's up. Enjoying it though.

I have a really long day today. Need to go to 2nd job tonight and run checks and statements. First I have to clean a/r up. This will take me all night. Might have to put checks off until tomorrow. I don't want anymore stress than I have. I am taking good food with me too. I made some rockin' swiss steak and can't wait to eat it. That will make my night much better for sure. DH can eat whatever he wants. I'm sure it will be the pizza joint next door.

As for CT'ing today, I don't believe there will be any time today. Tomorrow for sure. Talk about health benefits, CT has to be the gold mine. Something is definitely changing in me and I love it. I still cannot go long but I'm ok cuz I keep on a goin' anyway.

We had a simple dinner with friends last night and we laughed a lot. I think everyone there needed the good laughs and was enjoyed by all.

I had a few heart palps last night. Not sure what that was about. See what tonight brings. I did have some bark with lunch and maybe it was too much caffeine or my thyroid is turning on and I don't need as much anymore. Probably too soon but I'm a hopin' anyway!

Just finished my BAB and had a little reflux going on. 3 HCL was probably too much. No more today at all. Just enzymes. Also feeling like heart palps again, something strange feeling for sure. I do drink a cup a coffee with my BAB. Maybe I can't handle the caffeine at all anymore. I load up with coconut oil 3 or 4T plus butter in my coffee and BAB. Darn, I love my morning coffee.

HC 12.5, 10 & 7.5

DHEA 25 mg and Preg. 100 mg in the early am

Armour 2 gr. took in early am instead of 9:30 am.

L-glutamine (leaky gut), Silymarin (detox), DIM (estrogen dom.) and Kyolic garlic (Candida)

D3, Bcomplex, and C (been taking all along, forgot to note)

3 HCL and 2 enzymes w/BAB - testing the HCL as I am still not sure if I need it or not

### vkiernan — 2012-05-01T20:07:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-20490>

May 1st, Tuesday

Yeehah, slept again. Yes, I am on a roll. Feeling pretty good for the most part. Still not a beep today and no signs of pms. Loose stools yesterday and more so today. I did take 3 HCL yesterday so I think I really don't need anymore. Although, I like the get rid of stuff aspect cuz this isn't normal for me. I think some things are finally working and I am very happy about that.

Still a little hungry today. Wanted lunch by 11:30 but waited until noon. I go from really hungry to really full within 10 minutes. Maybe someday I just won't be as hungry and won't want to "eat now." Oh well, just doing what my body tells me to.

Will do my CT this evening. Got home at 9:30 last night and it was bedtime so no CT yesterday.

HC 12.5, 10 & 7.5

DHEA 25 mg and Preg. 100 mg in the early am - _I think the preg. is making me have heart palps. Won't take it tomorrow and see._

Armour 2 gr. took in early am instead of 9:30 am.

L-glutamine (leaky gut), Silymarin (detox), DIM (estrogen dom.) and Kyolic garlic (Candida)

D3, Bcomplex, and C (been taking all along, forgot to note)

no HCL and 2 enzymes w/BAB, mid morning, lunch, mid afternoon and supper - no more hcl for awhile - loose stools are telling me something.

Did my CT tonight and could only go 30 min. at 53. Left the girls and arms out and it didn't make a difference in regard to length. I was also very hungry for supper. Could barely wait until time to eat.

### vkiernan — 2012-05-02T14:39:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-20632>

May 2nd, Wednesay

Woke at 5 and laid there but went to bed at 9:30 so I'm good with 7.5 hours. Feeling a little tired today but it is a rainy day and that always makes me tired. I still feel normal though and not bitchy. Yeh another day of feeling human! I'm really starting to like this way of feeling sorta happy. There just might be a light at the end of this tunnel that has taken me 9 months to crawl through.

Gotta go get ready for the dentist first thing this am. Love getting my teeth cleaned.

HC 12.5, 10 & 7.5

DHEA 25 mg and Preg. 50 mg in the early am - I think the preg. is making me have heart palps or possibly the caffeine(I so love my morning coffee, I might have to stop it though as I know I shouldn't have caffeine anyway). Split the preg. capsule in half and will take the half at lunch. Noticed I was getting tired in the afternoon. Will see if that helps. No heart palps just yet, oops here they come or that whatever that strange feeling is (not as bad as yesterday though and none after lunch). Hmmm, got to be the preg or coffee as no Armour taken yet.

Armour 2 gr. Forgot to take this early am, will take @9:30 am

L-glutamine (leaky gut), Silymarin (detox), DIM (estrogen dom.) and Kyolic garlic (Candida)

D3, Bcomplex, and C (been taking all along, forgot to note)

1 HCL and 1 enzymes w/BAB, mid morning, lunch, mid afternoon and supper - did 1 hcl before I went this morning and now I know I shouldn't have taken it. Another pile of pooh(sorry, need to document everything), I am definitely getting cleaned out. This is a good thing! My doc will be proud of me!

Did my CT tonight and I warmed up a little quicker in the water but I still only lasted 30 minutes. Did the upper body too. Left half the feet out and warmed up a lot quicker afterwards.

Was hungry for lunch today but thankfully wasn't so ravenous for supper. I like not having that total hunger feeling. Also, still tired this afternoon. Maybe need the other 2.5 of HC or maybe just some more sleep.

May 3rd, Thursday

Yes!!! Another night of sleep. I went to bed around 9:15 and woke at 5 but fell back asleep until almost 6. I feel pretty good. No signs of pms or otherwise. Have a busy day today. Hope I get my CT time in this evening.

HC 12.5, 12.5 (upped cuz I'm tired all afternoon) & 7.5

DHEA 25 mg and Preg. 50 mg in the early am - Split the preg. capsule in half and will take the half at lunch.

Armour 2 gr.

L-glutamine (leaky gut), Silymarin (detox), DIM (estrogen dom.) and Kyolic garlic (Candida)

D3, Bcomplex, and C (been taking all along, forgot to note) & mag (same here forgot to note)

1 enzymes w/BAB, mid morning, lunch, mid afternoon and supper

4 mag citrate & 2 glycinate, got to back off the citrate. Skinny pooh.

Well it's noon now and I blew up at hubby this am. So much for pms/ct detox or whatever ails me. He just won't make time for me. I feel tired and cranky. Guess I can't be perfect every day. I gotta figure out a way to not let his lack of attention to us not affect me. I tell him I always feel like I am last on the list but he just doesn't do a damn thing about it. So, I get really cranky then and it weighs heavily on me.

Feeling much better this afternoon and evening. I am not as cranky as this morning. I hope tomorrow will be an ok day for the mood thing. I do not want to be pissy again. I hate it!

Took an extra 2.5 of HC at noon as planned and seems like it worked. Wasn't yawning as much as the last few days.

Tried my first Kombucha and liked it. Might have to attempt to make it along with sauerkraut to get all my good gut stuff!

Wasn't nearly as hungry for dinner tonight. Good feeling to be able to wait to eat.

### PaulaRichards — 2012-05-05T22:17:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-21671>

Sorry you're experiencing such tension in your relationship. \*Hugs\*

It is hard when we're dealing with our health & doing everything we can to make ourselves healthy only to have to deal with relationship issues. I've dealt with trying times in a past relationship, similar to what you're describing & it affected me so much. My hair was thinning, I had unexplained physical symptoms to the point where my Dr sent me for a CT scan, etc. When he wouldn't make time or spend time with me, or didn't engage in conversation it would ruin \*my\* day and take a toll on \*my\* health! I don't think it affected him one bit! The relationship did eventually end but there were other issues too.

Of course hind site is 20/20 but I did learn that \*I\* was in control of how I felt. I couldn't control what he did or how he felt. I was responsible for my own health & happiness! I've used those lessons moving forward. Sometimes it's hard and I can't always "apply" it but I try not to let my sense of wellbeing or fullfillment be tied to someone else!

I hope that makes sense or didn't come off the wrong way. Do things that makes you feel good. Be good to yourself, you deserve it!

\*More Hugs\* and I hope things get better and feel better soon.

### vkiernan — 2012-05-06T20:56:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-21800>

@ABetterMe, unfortunately it is not related to CT. This has been my problem for many years. It is due to the AF and est. dominance. I think thru CT I have gotten rid of some estrogen but my mood still tanks. I'm sure I need progesterone. My naturopathic doc will only do prog. if my salivary cortisol reveals that my 17 hydroxy progesterone is low. I still had prog. lingering in my fat(it is stored there) when my last one was done and it showed high. It can't really be high because my whole hormone panel was tanked. It takes 2 months to rid the system of it. I will have to do another one to get true results and I will have to pay for it as ins. does not. She does not believe in blood hormone testing. It is so frustrating. She will get mad at me if I see the other doc too. I do see her Friday so I will see if I can gain any ground with her. I am going to ask her to do a blood test the same time I do the salivary and see the results. My dh says I should just call and make the appt. w/Dr. K. I know he is busy but it sounded so promising at the time. I really want to see him and have him for my doc until I can at least get things worked out. As long as I actually go there once a year, he can prescribe for me. I was hoping to get one of my docs on board to work with him. Then I could go to them and pay him for consults to get me on the right track. The old one might be more willing but the new one is way smarter. I really just have to think this all out and I guess bite the bullet and ask them.

May 7th, Monday

Wish it were Sunday. I think I need another day of respite. Dh woke me at 5 again but was able to fall asleep until 6. All is still pretty darn good on the sleep end. Still working on the mood thing and getting serious about it. Sent off an e-mail to see if the Dzugan drs can help me with the adenal fatigue, thyroid, hormones, leaky gut, etc. etc. Hopefully will get a response soon. Looking into the Wiley protocol too that Darleen mentioned. Looks like there is a ton of them in Chicago which is very doable. I want 1 good doc. Why is that so impossible????

I have a really busy day at work today. I really need to be able to focus and get it all done. Training new girl last Friday took more time and I didn't get enough done. I am really starting to fall behind and this is going to stress me further. Period end is next week and now I will be 3 months behind in some of bank recs. Yikes, never been that behind before. Where do I find the energy to keep up this pace??? I need to get fixed and soon. I am exhausted thinking about it.

Done with BAB and am feeling that funky feeling by my heart again and I have not taken my preg. Maybe the 1 cup of coffee is doing it.

I was wiped out later this morning and this afternoon. Not sure if it is stress related or not. I was yawning all afternoon. It seems that when I am really stressed, I yawn a lot and think my HC isn't doing anything. Perhaps I am using too much and have nothing left. Will have to ask on Friday. I was very full after dinner, shrimp in butter and CO and a salad with avocado and mac oil and balsamic v. for the dressing. I wanted to eat more and usually I'm good after eating. ### DarleenMB — 2012-05-12T06:07:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-23346>

I think your doc is wrong. bioidenticals do not harm your body. The naturopath I occasionally go to in Billings had a FIT when I told her I wanted to go on BHRT. After many emails back and forth it finally came out a friend of hers had tried the Wiley Protocol and developed cancer. It never occurred to my doc that perhaps the cancer was already in place and that the BHRT had nothing to do with it. She also thought I wanted to take them for vanity's sake. That was NOT my reason but so what if it was? It's not her place, or anyone else's, to judge why I am doing something.

If you really have liver issues the leptin reset should fix them. All that protein and no carbs or low carbs gives your liver a rest. At least that's my understanding from reading the Eades's "6 week cure."

Menopause has felled many a good woman because MEN do not understand it nor do they generally care to. Here, take this anti-depressant. You'll be fine. pfbbbbbbt.

### Jack Kruse — 2012-05-12T06:21:01+0300

### Lyndra — 2012-05-12T18:00:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-23400>

> **Jack Kruse;23429 wrote:** Darleen is spot on.......any doc who says bio identical hurt you is not worth seeing

When I asked my CW doc about bioidenticals, she handed me literature from the North American Menopause Association claiming they are dangerous. Why dangerous? The FDA won't approve them because there aren't randomized clinical trials showing safety & efficacy for all the permutations that are prescribed & compounded. But yet she was happy to prescribe a synthetic hormone that has been shown through clinical trials to be risky. Traditional hormones are big business and drug companies don't want to lose market share and distribute literature to docs that favors their position. Very few MDs out there have the time to research this field so they tell you what they have been told for years. Much like the lipid hypothesis. I'm not waiting to improve my life until 50 years of research studies show I'm on the path to optimal - I want it now!

### DarleenMB — 2012-05-12T20:52:33+0300

### vkiernan — 2012-05-14T14:43:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-23867>

Monday, May 14th

Wow, went to bed at 9:20 as I couldn't keep my eyes open and woke at 5:30 with the sunrise. Since I don't remember anything, I must have slept great. Anyway, sort of feel like I did. It is a beautiful sunny morning and the sun is coming thru the window and shining on me. So glad for that as this is period end at work and I have a ton to do. But, once I get this thru this week next week will be a breeze. Starting to get the new girl trained which will relieve me of a lot of stress and I can start to get caught up this week. Yeh! Had a nice weekend and wasn't bitchy either. Whew! That was a relief in itself. All my kiddos joined me for a Mother's Day dinner. As I sat there looking around the table, I felt very lucky to have them all in my life. They all took the time to be with me. How special is that!!!!

HC 12.5, 12.5 and 7.5

DHEA 50 mg (upped it Sunday just to see if I might need more than she is willing to give me based on my weight)

Preg. 60 mg preg. before BAB and 30 at lunch

Armour 2 gr. early am

L-glutamine (leaky gut), DIM (estrogen dom.), Silymarin (liver detox) and Kyolic garlic (Candida)

D3, B complex & C

2 HCL, 2 Enzymes and a little kombucha w/BAB (ran out in my work stash)

4 mag citrate & 2 glycinate

Did my CT Sat. & Sun. Was good. I am getting further down in the tub and getting more body exposure. I managed about 40 minutes on Sunday. When I get out, I shiver so bad my jaw hurts. I had to mow lawn Sunday and that warmed me right up.

Still no breast tenderness and don't know where I am cycle wise.

Read a great article on AF and I have to say I need to start doing a few things differently if I am going to heal myself. Very well written and sent it to DH. He needs to learn and understand things so he can help me too.

### vkiernan — 2012-05-16T20:42:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-24653>

Wednesday, May 16th

Worked a really long and hard day yesterday. Finished at job #1 at 5:15 and got to job #2 at 5:30 and left at 10 pm. Can't do this anymore this late at night. My sleep was the crappiest it has been in over 3 weeks. I knew that would happen. Happened the last time. I didn't want to go back tonight to finish and now I am paying for it. Other than that, I am a little tired (of course) and still pretty busy here today but all is good for the most part.

Ate the store rotisserre chicken last night and along with the heat I swelled up horrible. My shoes were too tight and barely fit to wear home and my legs were tight from the swelling. I still had sock marks this morning. It was bad. Won't be eating that chicken anytime soon.

DH leaves for Canada fishing tomorrow. I am going to enjoy this time to do everything just for me!!! I am taking myself shopping too!

Every morning that the sun is shining, I sit so it can shine on me and in my eyes. I am hoping this will help with the cortisol. I might need to actually go outside and sit. Not sure if it will benefit me thru the window.

Really trying hard to work on mindfulness from the Monk book. Lot's of good tips. I need to change my thoughts big time and not dwell on the past but keep to the present. "I" am probably the reason for my adrenal fatigue ultimately for allowing my thoughs to get me to this place!

HC 12.5, 12.5 and 7.5

DHEA 50 mg (upped it Sunday just to see if I might need more than she is willing to give me based on my weight)

D3, B complex, K, A & C

4 mag citrate & 2 glycinate

No CT last night or the night before due to work and eating time. Will for sure do it tonight. No one to stand in my way.

### vkiernan — 2012-05-19T04:24:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-25394>

Friday, May 18th

Since dh was gone for the 1st night last night, I slept ok. Went to bed at 9 and woke at 4:30. That was all she wrote. I was tired today but made it thru fine. Strange and still trying to figure it out, dh left me a really really nice note when he left yesterday. So, this morning I texted him and said good morning and I missed him, etc., he texted me back and said "driving." But the strange part is, he wasn't driving but merely "riding." So, he can't text me while riding with 3 other grown married men???? I asked him a few questions and all of his answers were 1 or 2 words. WTH???? He goes on a fishing trip, I am stuck at work and he can't text me anything? Blah, blah, blah. Guess I need to make the most of my shopping trip tomorrow. So I guess he has" checked out" and so be it. I will just not go there and let him be whatever it is he chooses. Otoh, I just found out my uncle died. Do I text and tell him? The spunky side of me says not but the smarter side of me says yes. Wonder which side will win?

The monk book says to put some goals down on paper. I have to figure them out first. Says not to be vague. One goal is to fix my mood issue so I can laugh a lot more things off and be a much happier person. Currently it doesn't take much and I get frustrated. I sort of have a short fuse sometimes. Would be nice to fix that. Another goal is to lose some of my flab. Pretty hard with AF and no exercise allowed. I think I am getting flabbier too. My son's wedding is in a few months. I am not going to look very good at this rate.

Read one of Dr. K's comments on his AF blog and talked about only using HC for 2 weeks if at all. Hmmm, been on it for 1.5 months. Can't wait for my consult. I know he doesn't like to give it but what are all of circumstances and for how long are the questions to be answered. Wish I could just fly down this coming week and see him and get my life back. Would love to start up on my progesterone cream again but if I am going to get tested, I don't know if it will interfere or not. Probably should wait.

Really cool thing, I still don't have ANY breast tenderness. This is since the last nasty detox I went thru which I think is about 1 month ago. I should look it up. That is a milestone for me and a great relief.

HC 12.5, 12.5 and 5

DHEA 25 mg

Preg. 60 mg preg. before BAB and 30 at lunch

Armour 2 gr. early am

L-glutamine (leaky gut), DIM (estrogen dom.), Silymarin (liver detox) and Kyolic garlic (Candida)

D3, B complex, K, A & C

Sauerkraut for the gut at lunch and supper too (my gut seems to like the sauerkraut and kombucha) me too

Sunday, May 20th

AM:

Ok, no word from dh. He really did check out. I don't appreciate this at all. He leaves and doesn't check in. Hmmm. I'm really confused by his methods. Slept until 4 this am and woke up and laid there for a bit. Ended up falling asleep until 6ish. I am kinda dragging today. Going shopping again anyway. I DO NOT like being home alone this much. I see why older people die after their loved one's die. I miss him even though he is kinda being a jerk in my mind.

Going to look for a dress today for my son's wedding. I am kinda excited and want to find a great dress. It is going to cost me some bucks but oh well. This is a really big event and I don't want to embarrass my son in any way.

Found some nice things yesterday. Was a good day overall. I even got a pedicure and one of those 15 min. massages. I do wonder though why my heels are the worst they've ever been and my diet is the cleanest? Something is not right. Dr. K. would tell me diet isn't good I think, but I know it is way better than even a few months ago. Is it because I walk around barefoot inside and out? Or?

Ok, not sure what is going on. Yesterday I wasn't very hungry and today I ate BAB at 6:30 and I didn't eat again until 4:30 this afternoon. Even then the little hunger I had wasn't screaming at me. No lunch! Unheard of for me. Don't know if it's because I added bacon and sausage to me BAB or ???? It was great though not thinking about food or getting crazy cuz I got to eat and can't. Wonder what tomorrow will bring.

No words from the DH yet. Since when does going North with the boys constitute ignoring the wife completely. Any thoughts from anyone out there?

Monday, May 21st

AM:

Went to bed around 9:30 and woke at 5. What is up with that. Why can't I sleep until 5:30 at least. 7.5 hrs everyday. Maybe that is all I am supposed to sleep. I wake with the birds everyday. DH has still checked out. I think I need to send an e-mail. Hopefully once he realizes what he is doing he will do what's best and at least keep in contact once a day or something.

I have my uncles wake tonight and funeral tomorrow. This is a man who had me give my blankie to the baby raccoons when I was really little. He was a fav. uncle for sure. I spent a lot of time with him and my auntie when I was a baby up until I was a teen. Greatly influenced by them both. Loved him for sure. He lost his 1st daughter when she was 8 months to sids. I was about 8 by then. Very sad.

I got thinking about the very dry heals. I stopped taking fish oil when I ran out about 2 months or so ago. I wonder if that is part of it?

HC 12.5, 10 and 5 (still dropping down to see if I sleep better) I am just not that tired anymore at 9pm. This is a change for me.

Sent the e-mail and all is somewhat good I guess. I even was very nice and just explained I didn't understand, etc. He sent them to my other account that I cannot access while not at work. He should have known better.

### vkiernan — 2012-05-23T04:05:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-26561>

Tuesday, May 22nd

Went to bed at 10:30 and woke at 4:30. Where did my beautiful sleep go??? It was so good for those few weeks that I anticipated it continuing but it's not. Skyped with the dh last night. Still couldn't tell me he missed me; although, he was in a room full of people and maybe that scared him off. Don't understand why it would though.

Anyway, had my phone consult with Dr. K. Went well although I wish someone would have told me I could write up my history before hand and send it to him. I'm sure there will be a next time. I now have a plan and it starts with finding a good functional med doc. I have sent the e-mails out so now I will wait for some responses. I'm excited once again but this time I know more what to look for. He told me it is all in the gut and iirc that is why the adrenals are fatigued. I am irritated at my doc for not treating my gut more appropriately. I have wasted more time and money. I know this whining will get me no where but just need to vent.

Had my uncle's funeral today. We stayed the entire afternoon and visited with family. It was very nice. Downside is - my aunt is a great cook and made a lot of food that I can no longer eat. I ate 2 small pieces of ham, 1/2 pickle, a piece of celery. Stuck to my rules. Dr. K reminded to do no grains and no dairy. I've been pretty good about no grains but had let dairy slip back in. I gave my cream to my daughter tonight. Out of house, can't eat it.

Finally slept last night better than the last few nights. Took a little melatonin and it seemed to work; I was exhausted though from the funeral. I have a dentist appt. to replace a chipped filling. Thursday, May 24th

Took my melatonin again last night and slept from 9:30 to 5ish. 7.5 hrs again. That must be my limit for now. Strange. I always feel like I need more sleep. I am tired today but not as crabby and stressed like yesterday. My hunger is still down. I haven't been hungry for lunch until almost 2 and I have been eating BAB earlier than normal. ### vkiernan — 2012-05-25T20:18:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-27397>

Friday, May 25th

No melatonin taken last night. Felt I didn't need it. Slept from 9:30 to 4 and finally fell back asleep unitl almost 6. I am very tired (especially in the eyes) today. Haven't been this tired in a while. Did my CT last night and my water temp is only 60. This means I will have to ice. Damn, why can't it stay cold. I might have to go to the lake if the water is cold enough yet. I have been getting cold in the car though and that is at least something. Dh comes home tomorrow really late. I am happy about that.

I have been nauseous the last 2 days. Don't know what is up with that either.

I know I have gained a few lbs in the last several weeks. I am much flabbier as you can see it in the arms, legs and the belly. I actually lost 1 or 2 lbs from CT'ing over a month ago so I am at a loss why this would be happening unless it is the HC. I still have no breast tenderness so that is a plus.

Dr. K told me to find a func. med doc. and I found one about 45 min. away which isn't so bad. I will speak with her next week and get a better feel on my situation. Will probably see her and the old one since it is all supplement based. That way I stay on HC and armour for now and have a doc to give it to me. This will allow me to figure out the gut and start treating it for whatever is wrong with it.

Still backing off quantity for lunch and dinner and didn't need lunch until 1:30. Not that hungry and a little seems to fill me. My lunch today was a small burger with a few sauteed mushrooms. And, the hunger still isn't grabbing me. Could CT'ing be helping this too????

PM:

Left work early and got home by 4:15, crashed on the couch until 5:45. Wow, I feel a whole lot better. I was tired today and I guess it was real and I needed some sleep. I am hoping it doesn't mess with tonight. I never expected to crash that long.

DH surprised me tonight by calling, they are on their way home. Won't get in until around 4 though. Long night for him riding.

Did my CT tonight and turned a nice pink. Let the warm water clear from the pipes and got it down to 55 again. I am happy about that. Pretty soon I will water the plants outside to use up the warm water and bring on the cold from the well. That ought to do it.

This morning I was set to go see the func. med doc but now I might have changed my mind. I sought out the lab companies that Dr. K told me to do to see what docs in my area use them and a bio doc that I saw for a seminar on bios was on the list. He has a good background so I am very interested and he is only 1 hr away. Gotta keep hoping right!

### DarleenMB — 2012-05-25T21:25:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-27416>

Just a couple of thoughts. Is your bedroom completely dark? I put room darkening drapes in ours (they still leak a little bit of light) and this morning it was really overcast and I was zonked out deadtotheworld until my mouthy little cat decided it was high time I got my butt out of bed. TEN HOURS!! I slept for ten whole hours. BLISS.

I read in one of Suzanne Somers's books that even light TOUCHING your skin raises cortisol levels and wakes you up (I think that's right). I have always blamed it on "thin eyelids" LOL because the INSTANT the room starts to get light I wake up and cannot go back to sleep.

On the whole hubby thing, I'll keep this super short. For years I complained that his friends came first, his family second, the pets next while I brought up the rear. He, of course, denied it. Then as I was getting ready to go out to lunch with some of my friends I realized something. I mean, there I was getting super gussied up and it made me stop and wonder WHY. Then the light dawned. Because my women friends give me the emotional support I need. That's not to say DH doesn't support me. He does. But in HIS way. Learning to accept the differences really helped me a lot. HTH.

### vkiernan — 2012-05-26T04:31:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-27558>

Hi Darleen. Did you jump in the tub of cold yet??? Thanks for looking in on me. No on the room darkening blinds but we do have wooden blinds that do a fair job. It is not light out yet at 4 am so it is probably a body part crying out for help. Although I can't sleep when the sun comes up either. We are probably going to be changing our bedroom stuff and this will be the perfect time to get those drapes. I have wanted them for quite some time. I know with the way I sleep or rather don't with light that I really need them.

Great advice on the dh. Really though, I just want a romp in the bedroom once in a while! LOL How's that for putting it out there. I was angry that he didn't make time before he left. He was going to be gone for 10 days!!!! I know his hormones are trashed plus being a small business owner for the last 25 years has taken it's toll on the poor guy. I need to get a life and start enjoying it for sure. Sometimes it is easier said than done. I know my hormones get in the way too. They make me insecure and whiny and need to be balanced for sure. I can tell you my consult with Dr. K was really great and I have a plan. Unfortunately the hormone stuff is at the end of the plan. But I did what he told me to do to find a doc and one that came out of it was a hormone doc that I have gone to for a seminar about bio-identicals. He is actually a bodylogic doc. So I'm thinking if he can help me with the other stuff, he can certainly help me with my hormones. He was a gynecologist before this so I am seriously thinking about trying him out.

### vkiernan — 2012-05-26T16:40:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-27626>

Saturday, May 26th

Slept poorly last night but I'm sure it was because I knew dh was coming home and I kept waking up thinking I heard him. Oh well, not cranky today so far so all is good. Grandaughters are coming over today. I thought we would go buy flowers and plant them but it is raining. Maybe we should go shoe shopping or something instead. Got to keep them out of the house so he can sleep. He got home at 5 am. They love to shop.

Had a great nap and CT last night. Both felt really good and were needed.

Still no dairy. Proud of myself. Not even butter! I have to make some ghee though.

### vkiernan — 2012-05-28T15:57:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-28016>

Monday, May 28th

Maybe my good sleep is returning. All things considered, I slept fairly well last night. Did not lay awake at any point in time. I woke up and felt like I had slept. That is a good night and I feel fairly happy and not cranky.

Did my CT last night and it was a little bit easier. I am still getting further down in. Can't go past 35 min. yet though and water is 55. I let it run to clear the warm water out of the pipes and that is working well so at least it is 55. I might try the water bottle thing and see if that helps too. I have never gone below around 53. Wonder if it really is easier like some say. Would be interesting to buy the ice and try it out.

I have not eaten any dairy in a week. No butter even. My diet is very clean. I wonder if that was contributing to the blood sugar thing. My stomach is also going down again a bit. My diet is meat (gf beef & abf pork), seafood, fish, eggs, bacon, pork sausages, cocobark (oil, manna, 99 cocao, stevia, vanilla) broccoli, cauliflower, organic avocados(once in a while), spring baby greens, cukes, celery, a few little tomatoes every now and then, (dressing is mac nut oil w/balsamic vinegar, Kombucha, saukraut,mushrooms, onions, liverwurst and canadian bacon. I don't vary from this often. As far as I know, these are "safe" foods for me to eat. My main spices are sea salt, garlic, onion, turmeric, black pepper and sometimes, chili powder.

My hunger is still at bay. Did not eat lunch yesterday. It is still not "grabbing" me either right now. I start to get hungry and then think about eating; I lasted 3 hours yesterday from the time I thought about eating lunch until we finally ate around 4:30 ish. My BAB was at 7ish. That feeling is so different than what I was experiencing with the gotta eat now. Wonder if CT'ing is helping with the blood sugar thing. I am going to continue. This has been going on since last Saturday. Normally if my hunger resides, it is only a day or two type of thing and then it is gone. Might really be a change. We'll see after this week, if I can go 2 weeks then I think it is a real change and not just something in passing.

As for changes, still no breast tenderness. I cannot tell you how great it is to not go thru that 2 weeks out of every month. Very, very painful for sure. I

Had to force my BAB this morning. I really didn't need all that food or at least that is what my stomach says. Would be a good time to CT cuz it takes that really full feeling away and that is what I am feeling right now.

HC 12.5, 12.5 and 7.5

DHEA 75w/BAB

Preg. 90 mg w/BAB and 60 at lunch

Armour 2 gr. early am plus 1 enzyme

L-glutamine (leaky gut), DIM (estrogen dom.), Silymarin (liver detox), dgl licorice, l-theanine

D3, B complex, C

2 HCL (my throat hurts again and my voice is trashed-so seeing if this helps) and 1 Enzyme w/BAB, mid morn, lunch, afternoon, supper and before bed if I remember.

4 mag citrate & 2 glycinate (need to buy mag theonate)

maca 1 T

Aloe juice (after the bottle is gone I am going to stop for a bit)

PM:

Would someone please tell me how I went from eating my BAB at 7 and not eating until supper at 5???? This is so huge for me. Got to be a good sign for sure. I did hav a nauseated stomach along with a headache a big part of the afternoon. Don't know what that's about.

### vkiernan — 2012-05-29T14:41:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-28157>

Tuesday, May 29th

Slept fairly well again last night. I am so excited that I went from BAB at 7 to supper at 5 for next meal. Don't know how in the world I did that. Been not needing lunch all week for the most part. Has to be a good sign. BAB was too big this morning. Thinking I need to cut back.

I am feeling pretty good right now. I was exhausted Saturday and half of Sunday but am feeling better now and stomach nausea is gone too. Need another day off but not gonna happen at least not today. I am still fairly happy. Got to enjoy the better mood before it disappears. Still gotta figure out the doc thing. Dh wants me to stay in network but don't know how that will happen. Wednesday, May 30th

Slept ok but woke at 5:15. Need some sleep for sure. I worked late last night and will work late tomorrow night. Not looking forward to it.

I'm confused. I wanted lunch today. The only difference between the last 2 days and last week was the amount of fat I was eating with my BAB. I usually don't eat sausage or bacon and I had been eating it all last week w/BAB. So I got some more sausage and tomorrow I will be eating it along w/BAB and see how far it takes me. I didn't eat supper last night so I hope it didn't throw me out of whatever was happening. Surprisingly wasn't that hungry, a little but not devasting. ### melrito — 2012-06-01T14:32:51+0300

Now that I've added the leaky gut rx to my ct, I am no longer hungry at all, eating 2 relatively small meals. I didn't notice any changes after stopping eggs... but I didn't want to continue eating something that wasn't optimal for me. I hope when my gut is healed I can add them back, because I sure do miss them. Sardines or any fish would be a great choice - lots of protein.

Friday, June 1st

Holy crap where does the time go??? It's June already. Went to bed shortly after 8:30; was wiped out. Slept ok, always get woken by dh when he comes go bed and a couple times a night usually. Am still tired but at least felt like a kinda slept. We are flying to KS tomorrow early am to buy dh a vehicle and will be on a road trip driving home tomorrow and Sunday possibly. Ok, I have to change more of my diet to attempt to get better. What will I do? Damn iron anyhow. I could almost live on LIVErwurst if it wasn't for the iron. Apparently I absorb iron well. ### melrito — 2012-06-01T16:19:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-28849>

> **vkiernan;28932 wrote:** Melrito: What all are you doing then for leaky gut? I have been working on it for awhile except apparently the egg thing and a few small other things. Your hunger went away too? You really have had success. I am happy for you.
>
>
>
> How did you escape the Candida if you had leaky gut. I thought it caused leaky gut?

I haven't been tested for candida, but I know that both garlic and CO will kill it and I eat a ton of those. I have gluten sensitivity and Dr. K said that combined with my previous diet caused my leaky gut - I guess based on the questions he asked and my history that he wasn't worried about candida in my case. I am following the leaky gut rx with most of the supplements, bone broth, mushrooms, cilantro, and turmeric on everything. Fermented veggies or home-brewed kombucha (brewed long to get rid of the sugar - it's like vinegar and I add fresh pressed ginger juice) with every meal. I avoid all nightshades, eggs, caffeine (never drank coffee anyway, but have stopped green tea), chocolate, dairy (not even ghee). basically seafood, grassfed meat and liverwurst, bacon, mushrooms, herbs, fermented foods, and CO. It's restrictive, but I figure that will make it heal faster.

Sunday, June 3rd

Got up yesterday @3am to fly to KS to buy dh his new vechicle. We bought it then drove to St. Louis to see the Arch and then drove home and arrived at 2:30 am. VERY LONG DAY! I am sure I will pay for it today and tomorrow. I kept falling asleep most the way home except when I had to drive from 10:30 pm to 1:30 am. At least traffic thru Chicage was down and the drive itself wasn't that stressful.

Why does flying swell me up something terrible??? That is so frustrating. I am going to CT this morning and hope it takes some of it away. Maybe I can get the dh to take the boat out and then I can go swim in the lake. Got to be fairly cold in the middle yet. That would be awesome if we could do that. We have not made out maiden voyage yet this year. Time to do that. Summer is basically here and will be gone before you know it.

I am feeling kinda shaky this am. Not sure why. Stomach is a little off. Was off yesterday for sure.

2 mag l-threonate, 2 citrate & 2 glycinate

maca 1 T

### vkiernan — 2012-06-06T14:46:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-29688>

Wednesday, June 6th

Actually slept until 5:30 this am. That was great. The other half still woke me up on occasion but I fell right back asleep. Took my new mag last night. Maybe it helped or maybe I was so exhausted mentally that I just needed the sleep.

Hazyjane, that sweet lady, has been helping me and I am excited for my new supps to come that she recommened. Things for the candida (if I still have it, which I think I do) and things for the leaky gut. I am also getting a dvd on qiqong to help my adrenals.

Mood is ok. I am a tad bit mad at the other half for something stupid (yes, I recognize that it is stupid but just can't seem to change my thinking) so I think it might be pms. Hmm, might be a step in the right direction though at least recognizing it. Why does it seem that I like to be "mad" at him? Am I looking for some sympathy even though I know I won't get it? Kinda like Indigogirl says about cheating and the 5 year old. I am the same way but with feelings towards my dh instead of food. I always feel like he doesn't love me cuz he is not loving like he use to be. I don't know how to get over that. If I could, I believe a lot of my stress would just "go" away. I know I need more love than he is currently willing to give. He use to; I just don't understand why good things always go by the wayside.

No CT since Sunday. I am free tonight so maybe I will come home, eat, CT and then go plant more flowers. I know CT will energize me and I will want to warm up and going outside is the best way to do it. That's my plan and I'm stickin' to it!

My stomach was bloated yesterday and I don't know why. BAB was eggs, sausage (no msg), gf burger & a little kombucha. I eat this stuff everyday. Lunch was gf burger, a little sweet potato, sauerkraut (probiotics) and a little coco bark. Nothing out of the norm. Will see what today brings. No more nausea though like I had been having the prior week. I hate that feeling. My lower legs have been aching though for at least a week. I don't do anything so why do they ache?

Still not mentally prepared to give up eggs. Got to figure it out in my mind before I do it. I have to have a plan. That is one thing I have realized about myself is I like plans to keep me organized. This way I know what to expect and when. I noticed I did that with the LRx and CT plan. Had to read about it and then process the plan and then proceed. I started them but on my own time. I did not just jump in the same day like others. I started a few weeks after but ultimately started.

HC 12.5, 12.5 and 7.5

DHEA 25 & 50 7-keto w/BAB (changed to 7-keto because of some new acne on the face which isn't normal but it is on the side I sleep on and I got a new pillow-so not sure why, been going on for several weeks now)

Preg. 120 mg w/BAB and 90 at lunch

Armour 2 gr. early am plus 1 enzyme

DIM (estrogen dom.), Silymarin (liver detox), dgl licorice, l-theanine

D3, B complex, C

1 Enzyme w/BAB, mid morn, lunch, afternoon, supper and before bed if I remember.

2 mag l-threonate, 2 citrate & 2 glycinate (this combo worked great for bm)

maca 1 T

PM:

Ok, I commented above about liking being mad at him. I thought more about this and the answer is no. It is no because when my mood is good, I do NOT have this problem. It is only when my mood is bad that I get like this. The question still remains why my mood tanks. Is it due to messed up stressed weekend, hormones, pms, adrenals???? I just don't know.

I also came up with something I really like that I could sub for eggs (see, I just have to give it some thought), it is smashed cauli. Warm, soothing and yummy. Not eggs, but I really like it and can eat it with any meat. I have a bunch in the fridge right now. Just need to saute the garlic and smach them up. My ninja will work great for this. I love my ninja. Thanks to whomever said they like theirs out here.

### Souldanzer — 2012-06-06T17:18:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-29717>

wash the pillow (is it just the case?)... I wash my pillow cases every wash I do, they get "contaminated" easily

### vkiernan — 2012-06-06T20:06:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-29745>

It is a brand new memory foam pillow. Yes, I always wash the case w/sheets once every week. Weird it is only on that side. But I noticed it after I got the new pillow but it could be timing of the DHEA too. So hard to tell.

I could always wash my old pillow and try that.

### Martin — 2012-06-06T23:18:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-29782>

Hi vkiernan, you struck some chords with me on the mood thing. It's a tough road sometimes. My DW has been gone for almost two weeks on a road trip and I am not missing the lack of empathy, and the fact that I am NOT being able to tell my partner how lousy I am doing. I've stepped in that too many times. I don't want her to fix it, I just want to let it out and not be judged. I keep my whining to myself. I know the moaning gets old to the d's, but can't they just listen and offer kindness, fer gawd's sake!

I have a theory about the legs aching. Mine kick in about an hour after I get up and don't let go until I go to bed. The thigh muscles are the biggest muscle group in the body and they are the first to go when things get wonky. That's my somewhat-read-something-a-long-time-ago opinion.

I go down to my garden and orchard for solace, but lately even that is not cutting it. Let it rot. But I know that when I get my mojo back, I'll be sorry I didn't give it more care and will have to start over. Good for you on planting things! I have three packs of shasta daisys waiting right now. Maybe tomorrow.

The egg thing. Oh boy, do I identify. I went off them four months ago and I think every morn I'm going to take my freshly-laid, total free-range eggs and go crazy cooking them up. But I have always half-assed my care and I'm sticking to the AI diet to rid me of this suffering. I wish you well on your road to decide to forgo them, if you decide to. I MISS them! Eggs! Coffee with heavy cream! Is it to much to hope for?!

### vkiernan — 2012-06-08T14:58:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-30097>

Friday, June 8th

I have to say if anything has improved, it is my sleep. Not fantastic but better than it was. Even if I wake at 4:30, I am still sleeping most of the night. Have to be happy about that.

Been ticked at dh most of the week. Like always, no time for me. Some how I got to get over this. Maybe the new doc next week will have some answers about my mood tanks. That would be refreshing to not feel this way. This has been our life for a quite a few years. You would think he would get it by now but he doesn't understand yet. I go from normal to cranky and he says he doesn't understand. REALLY?!? I have explained it until I am blue in the face.

Asked Dr. K about CT'ing and adrenals and how much and how long before it shows. His answer was most appriopriate and I knew the answer. This means I need to do it fast and furiuos if I want real progress. I was doing great and feeling better. Now that I have slacked, I am moody and no energy. I should start doing it in the am again cuz no one interferes with me on that like at night.

Will have the granddaughters this Saturday. Hopefully they won't wipe me out for the whole weekend. Maybe I should buy them a pool so they have something to occupy themselves with. Heck, I could even CT for a bit with them. They would love that. Well water is still coming out 53 degrees.

I still have NO breast tenderness after that terrible detox. AMAZING!!!! I cannot express how grateful I am to Dr. K. for this. This also tells me how beneficial CT'ing truly is!!! I have gained weight. I don't own a scale but my pants are tighter. From what I have been reading this is happening to a lot of people and if they keep going, they lose the weight and appetite diminishes. I must get back to CT'ing ASAP. I have been a wimp this whole last week and used the excuse about feeling crappy. Have not done it since Sunday. Someone - kick me in the arse please!

HC 12.5, 12.5 and 7.5

DHEA 25 & 50 7-keto w/BAB

Preg. 90 mg w/BAB and 90 at lunch

Armour 2 gr. early am plus 1 enzyme

DIM (estrogen dom.), Silymarin (liver detox), dgl licorice, l-theanine

D3, B complex, C, Cq10 (last couple of days, forgot to note)

1 Enzyme w/BAB, mid morn, lunch, afternoon, supper and before bed if I remember.

2 mag l-threonate, 2 citrate & 2 glycinate

maca 1 T

### Jack Kruse — 2012-06-08T15:52:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-30110>

sleep is the first massive step to totally recovery.......rejoice in that today. focus on your successes and your failures will fade to black

### [email redacted] — 2012-06-08T16:45:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-30122>

Yay, V! What great news! And an appauld from Dr K!

IMHO, I think you gotta start valuing you more, then others will follow. You gotta lead by example. When you put yourself first, others will follow. Can you see how the DH is mirroring your behaviors? Each time you do something nice for yourself or put your adrenal health first, then you are showing others how you expect to be treated. I KNOW you're worth it! From now on, when I feel myself getting stressed, I just ask myself "is it worth hurting my adrenals over?" The answer is always NO!

I know it's hokey, but the book "Truly Mars and Venus" by John Gray helped me when I was in a bad spot. It gave me something to focus on (my own thoughts and feelings and not what the SO was or was not doing) and feel like I was in control again. I got it from the library and it's a quick little read. Hope I'm not overstepping, just want you to feel better! And yes, I am SMILING today! Thanks for your support and hope I gave some back to you!

[http://www.amazon.com/Truly-Mars-Venus-Illustrated-Essential/dp/0060085657/ref=cm\_sw\_em\_r\_dp\_r-F0pb01JXS9G\_tt](http://http://www.amazon.com/Truly-Mars-Venus-Illustrated-Essential/dp/0060085657/ref=cm_sw_em_r_dp_r-F0pb01JXS9G_tt)

Jen, Thank you soooo much for the thoughts! Never overstepping, so don't ever think that. We just get caught in our own little thoughts and need someone to "remind" us. I have never been told to lead by example when it comes to me. It has never been about me ever. Not my childhood, my first marriage or my now second. Amazing when you think about it - what I might accomplish if I set some ground rules in a round-about way. Why is it sooo hard for us to ask for anything from them but they don't have a problem asking us????

I did read what you have wrote about what you are saying to yourself to save your adrenals. I actually tried to apply it just recently but it didn't work for me. I guess I have to come up with my own thought to trigger me. It is the perfect thought though for both of us. Maybe I need to give it more thought too. I will order your little book too. Love to read that stuff. I know I have a mars and venus book somewhere.

It was cool that D. K. dropped by today. It is always unexpected and very much appreciated. I will take what you wrote to heart and attempt to implement it. You know on days that my mood doesn't tank I can ask him for things, but on the moody days I just can't. All in good time though.

### vkiernan — 2012-06-11T20:53:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-30568>

Monday, June 11th

Shall I say lonnnnng weekend?!! No down time and then my Pop ended up in the hospital late last night. Seriously bad bladder infection that affected his heart. His defibulator had to jump start him 3 times. Sooo scary. We thought last night was it. He is doing much better today and coherent. This is my week from hell at work and I am exhausted. Somehow will make it thru. No more than got into bed and starting falling asleep around 1:30 am when hubby jumped up and turned on the lights as he was hearing something. Somehow a damn bat got in the bedroom. Don't know where it came from. I managed to make the bed right before we went to sleep and I never saw it. It was hiding somewhere. He sucked it up with the vacuum. I hate them things and the bugs they carry.

I did CT twice this weekend. Once at home and once in the lake with my babes. That was fun.

TMI for some, a little nipple tenderness but not breast. Perhaps pms. I'm ok with this minimalness. Very tolerable.

### vkiernan — 2012-06-13T14:28:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-30871>

Wednesday, June 13th (I think)

Been a long couple of days at work. Even though I was working until 7:30 ish both days I was able to be in bed by 9 and sleep until 5:30. I have hit a new record. This for me is fantastic. Maybe the mag l-threonate is helping. I still have a long day today but I do not plan on staying very late. I need some down time.

Saw a new doc yesterday and she immediately told me she was not for me as she has no experience in what I am dealing with. I actually ended up really liking her. We ended up talking for quite some time and she was very willing to schedule tests for me (some repeats and some new ones to check my pituitary and ACTH as no one has done this yet. She also told me which doc to see in that clinic and a naturopath down the road who will work in conjunction with the other new one. Unbelievable that they will actually work together for me. I cannot get in until Aug. but what else can I do. I am going to wean off my HC now and a lot of other things so they don't interfere with the tests. I am happy about that as I have gained 4.5 lbs in the last 2 months from the HC. I doubt that CT'ing is doing that as I had lost a lb. prior to gaining the 4.5. So, I now weigh 126 vs. 122 that I had weighed forever. I knew my pants were tight. If the clothes still fit the same and I weighed more I would rejoice but since they are tighter, I am not real happy.

\*I am gong to start weaing off off a few things today and see how it goes.

Thanks for visiting. Sleep was great but the last few days it hasn't been as great but still ok. I'm not complaining but sure wish it would stay great. Hubby is waking me though so maybe that's part of it. I think I need to make the room colder than 64. I am too warm and I'm sure he is even warmer.

### vkiernan — 2012-06-16T15:06:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-31527>

Saturday, June 16th

Wow, I have not posted since Wednesday. This has been the week from hell work wise for sure. Yesterday was a good day all around for me. Somehow last night I pulled out some energy and finished planting my plants. Felt pretty good energy and mood wise. It was a beautiful evening here last night and I enjoyed being out in it. That hasn't happened in a while for me.

Since my dr. appt. I have begun to cut back on the HC. It was bull\*\*\*\* that she didn't tell me I would gain weight from the HC. Now I have to figure out how to get it off. It is tough enough without all my damn issues. Oh well, this will force me to CT a lot and stop that stuff entirely. Some of the swelling that was in my feet this week is now going down a little. This all is so frustrating.

I am NOT hungry at all this morning, not that I ever really am even after all this time but today is STUFF IT DOWN ANYWAY DAY! So I am.

I have a wedding, a grad party and a retirement today. We "have" to go to all three. I will be good. I don't know what was up lately, I have wanted a lot of chocolate and did eat too much. Perhaps thats why sleep wasn't as great. Almost seems like L-glutamine gives me cravings if that is possible. I started up this week again and I had cravings this week too. Or could just be pms but who knows anything. I also am constipated. WTH. I even took 4 mag citrate when 1 had been working. Why do things keep changing. Ah, but can L-glutamine affect that too??? I have dropped way back on supps too and perhaps that is part of it.

### vkiernan — 2012-06-19T05:01:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-32080>

Monday, June 16th

I posted this morning and it must have went bye bye. Let's try again. Friday night, Saturday and Sunday I had energy. Hmmm, where did it come from. I am also weaning off my HC so that is pretty strange. I am going to try to give up coffee too since I will not have as much support from the HC moving forward. This will be 1 week with 12.5 mg less per day. I am tired today but also worked a lot this weekend physically which would normally exhaust me in 1/2 day and the following couple of days. I believe the CT is working and will continue for sure. I managed to go a little longer the last few days which is exciting. A little progress but still progress!

Work was quiet today and I got a couple of old bank recs reconciled and am so relieved. Some stress gone. Yay!!!

### vkiernan — 2012-06-21T04:02:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-32588>

Wednesday, June 20th

Where is the time flying to. June is 2/3rds overwith. I was tired today and came home and took a nap. Hopefully I can sleep tonight. Might be due to not taking my afternoon HC. Forgot and it was too late when I remembered.

Waiting on my chiro to call me and tell me my gi effects test is in. I am excited about taking it. Got to get to the root cause of my issues so I can move on to other things like the adrenals, then the thyroid and finally then the hormones. I think CT is working on some of those things already. I am not cold anymore at all. My hands are rarely cold and my dh said I am a lot warmer.

Getting a little more caught up at work. That makes me very happy. My bro just bought a new boat and I am going to help him set it up to go salmon fishing on Lake Michigan. Good times for sure.

### vkiernan — 2012-06-21T21:03:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-32770>

Thursday, June 21

Tired again today probably from not enough HC. Feel like I really need a nap. Did that last night and might do it again tonight. Been sleeping pretty good though. I have been doing a lot of CT'ing lately. I am going to lick this AF somehow someway. Maybe something is up there. I sure wish I would drop those 5 lbs I gained from I'm thinking the HC. Mood is ok but not great at all either. I wish it would pick up a bit. Still no call from chiro; think I'll call them. Could use a crack too while I'm at it.

One more week for Rhythm & Booms (our annual boat on the water watch the fireworks trip). Love, love, love it. We all have a great time. Take all the kids and their other halves. The water will be cold where the firworks are and I will be in it a lot. I'll show my kids what mom can do and they won't.

Backed off on the coffee this am too. Had a little and put the rest in the fridge for tomorrow. I will get off it slowly but surely.

### Martin — 2012-06-22T20:05:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-32975>

vkiernan,

I see you are weaning off HC. Good for you! It's full of benefits, but then, not so much. Don't we wish our bodies could just frickin' do it on their own?!

I've done two HC rounds over the past decade and had decent results the first time and next to nothing the second. First one got me though a massive five month kitchen/back-o'-the-house remodel, and showed me what "normal" felt like again. I had been slowly crashing hard for years, and HC and Armour really perked me up. Nothing like hormones coursing through one's body.

I've come to find out the HC is a bad thing when one has what I've got going on. Something to do with trashing the last metabolic pathway that hasn't been screwed by this biotoxin illness. I dont know how to definatively test for it, but my mold doc didn't freak at my ACTH levels and they are in the pathway affected. It is low, but not out of LabCorp's range. Still...

Keep pluggin' away.

### vkiernan — 2012-06-28T14:44:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-34130>

Thursday, June 28th

Hmmm, I had a bit of a meltdown last night. Dh calls me and we talk about what we are having for dinner and that he will go home (cuz I'm working yet) and start cooking. Then he calls me and tells me he asked a friend to have dinner with (not the other way around). Yes, I was a little pieved in the end. I gave it lot's of thought both ways and tried not to be but I ended up that way and let's just say that the night was short stupid. So, now I am going to pay for it. He won't cuz he just goes to bed and ignores it. My beef is, I am always last on the list. Of course the list never gets completed so one might as well say I am not even on the list. This will be a long day for me. I have a headache and a backache (stress) and am very tired. I supposed it is my own fault for letting him get to me. I just don't know how not to. This is my thinking...Why does he get to be happy when I am not. If I am happy then he thinks he is making me happy. Perhaps that is why I let him drag me down. Got to work on that one. Might even see a counselor as I need to heal my adrenals and there ain't no healing going on with this bull\*\*\*\* always happening. I need to figure out why he thinks the way he does. Damn!

Didn't do a CT last night, no time - had to work at dh's business and get groceries afterwards for out Saturday trip. I need to get out of my funk by then for my kid's sake.

Since I ate a little co yesterday I am going to do my test Friday (hopefully anyway) and give my gut a little more time to clear out anything that I have been eating that is on the list of no no's. I will be glad when that is over with.

Maybe I will come home for lunch and do my CT then. It usually energizes me so that might help me get thru the day.

This will be a long 2 weeks to wait for the results. Oh well, all in good time. In a few days it will mark the start of the LRx for me last year July 3rd, 2011. It has literally been a year. Took 1/2 day vacation this afternoon to wait for the fedex truck and to make food for tomorrow as long as I'm home. Got a great start on it and pretty soon I will go scrub the boat seats. Thursday, Just 5th

Yesterday was a bust. Was my 3rd anniversary with my dh and he forgot, again, for the 3rd year in a row. So, we cleaned a little house, I took a nap, then we went to an employee's cookout. On the way home stopped for gas and then the vehicle wouldn't start and we had to be towed. They dropped me off at home at 9:30 and dh went with to help unload the vehicle. Nice anniversary! Not. Just like the rest of them. What does one do when the dh does nothing for birthdays, christmas or anniversaries. Is he just lazy or what? To forget is really bad. Last year I was in one of my moods apparently and was not a happy camper at all if YKWIM!

I have my granddaughters overnight tomorrow. They usually wear me out. Hoping they will be a little mellower. I also have to clean this house by next Tuesday. Hard part is, I never know when I might have a little energy to do such a deed. Should call a house keeper in to help me and just not worry about it. It is his party and I won't even be here.

>
> Energy (1-5): 2

So here is an unsolicited observation about the anniversaries etc. . .

For edification, both my husband and myself forget our anniversaries. . and sometimes birthdays. To us, just not important. I've never been a ceremony person and detest anything hallmarky. I have a great friend married to a man more like me. . .doesn't care, it has no relevance to him. BUT, my friend CARES DEEPLY. Like if we forget her Birthday and she doesn't get the hallmark treatment, her feelings are really hurt.

What didn't work was waiting for it to be missed, and getting dissapointed as expected and then harboring resentment etc. Your husbands feelings (or lack thereof) for an Anniversary may not be at all related to his feelings about you or the marriage. If this is the case (and it's not some power/control/agressive maneuver) you just have to make him understand how it's important to YOU, and he needs to give you the birthday/anniversary that YOU want as a gift to you because he loves you. This training may need to involve you giving him warning, and letting him know in advance your desires. Men are pretty good about trying to make us happy with a clear map.

I know it's hard to get over the idea that "he should want to mark this most amazing day just like me", but no two people are alike. Your husband may just think like a manly man! That could be a good thing, and ironically - may be one of the reasons you were attracted to him in the first place.

I hope this advice isn't unwelcome, but I have done a lot of intense personality studies and it pains me to see what is basically a mis-communication make someone unhappy!

I have been struggling with the reset for 1 year now which is a long time. Mind you, obesity is not problem either. That's for me what has made this so tough, trying to figure out why I am not resetting or doing a whole lot better. This would certainly answer my questions. Taking DHEA and doing CT has been very beneficial for me by helping me sleep and getting rid of some estrogen as far as I can tell. I will know more this week from labs though on the estrogen.

Thanks for visiting me. I hope you too get some great answers.
