### vkiernan — 2012-07-12T20:54:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-37231>

Thanks Jen for visiting. Let's hope after all this time we are on our way. I am going to try to put together a little chart of the hormone 101 blog to get this all straight in my brain. Since I am seeing progress (as long as my labs are correct) I am kinda excited. Even my dh is excited. He says to me this morning, think about it, you are changing your chemistry! LOL coming from him. Mister I love me some pasta man.

So how I am I doing lately: Here's the scoop. I get tired by 9 or so and usually go to bed by 9:30 or so. I wake up everyday with no alarm (never have really) and and am awake by 5:30-6am. I love this time of the day. All by myself to get my BAB and read the forum. It is quiet and peaceful and the sun shines thru the window on my eyes too while I eat and read. About the time I leave for work at 8 am I am starting to get tired and could almost use a nap by then. My eyes are always really tired. Sometimes I wonder if my eyes weren't so tired how I would really feel? When I come home around 5 I really could use a nap and sometimes do. After stopping the HC, I yawn all day long. My mood has been much better lately. Have not done CT since Sunday except last night I did spot CT'ing on my belly and legs for about an hour. This was toooo easy and I have a hard time believing it does anything. There is no comparison to a CT in a tub with 53 degree water and spot CT. I could do that all night long with no prob.

Have quit most supps for a few days while waiting to do my gi effects test again. Sounds like I didn't cap them tightly and they leaked. I want to know how that is even possible when I know I capped them tightly.

My pants fit but not loosely like they did. I still did not drop what I gained from the HC. Must be here to stay. I might try using ice and dropping the temp in bath below 50 if I can to see if it will get those lbs. off. My son's wedding is in 3 weeks and it was not on my list to gain weight right before hand. Good thing my dress has some stretch.

Still waiting on my RT3 test in anticipation. I sure hope it is low! Would love for my T3 to actually reach my cells one of these days and give me some energy and allow me to work out just a bit. Hmmm, how many people actually say that. Yikes, perhaps a smidgen is sinking in. Off to read a little more before going back to work.

Copied form STTM: "If you are on desiccated thyroid (especially if lower than 3 grains) and find yourself with the free T3 high or above range in the presence of continuing hypothyroid symptoms, or even hyper-like symptoms (anxiety, shakiness), itâ€™s a clue you have adrenal fatigue, aka low cortisol." Hmmm, this is where I am at. Still waiting on my RT3 results. I sure hope they actually were doing one and didn't mess it up.

I am feeling better mood wise at least for now. Not brimming in energy but doing ok. Have been taking naps lately and they really help. My CT this morning was really good and easier than normal. Sometimes easy and sometimes really difficult.

### vkiernan — 2012-07-16T14:39:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-38325>

Monday, July 16th

I haven't been posting here very much lately. Not sure if I am going to as not much is changing right now or at least until I get those lab results I am waiting for. Supps still the same. Still feeling good mood wise. Yeah for me, nice change. I know the road will change but for now I am taking it. I have added progesterone to my regimen for now. Testing told me to. I will see the new doc in 3 weeks and we will see what she says. This will be the last straw; if she doesn't work, I am interviewing like Doc says and going out of network. As much as I want to go to Tenn., I realize I need someone here to manage me.

I also wanted to report that my toenails are growing. I had a pedicure the end of May and they have really grown out. I probably only cut my toenails 4 or 5 times a year. This is big for me. Must mean something good. Still waiting to have moons on fingernails though. One of these days it will all come together.

My boss is gone all week. Will be more relaxed this week. I will not push quite so fast to get the numbers rolled out. I have noticed that a lot the time when I speak, I feel I have to throw the words out or no one is listening. I think this impacts my adrenals and causes me stress. This happens a lot with my DH. He is always busy and I feel if I don't speak really fast, I can't tell him anything. I know he listens xxxxassed anyway. Got to slow it down somehow.

Keep at it, it will work out.

### vkiernan — 2012-07-17T14:49:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-38683>

Tuesday, July 17th,

Wow, this month will be gone in a flash and summer will almost be over. It is flying too fast and it has been hotter than heck up here. Holy sleep last night. I am glad I woke when I woke today or I would have over slept. Now if dh would quit waking me up in the night by rolling over practically on me, I would have nothing to complain about. Still feeling ok mood wise.

I had a great CT sunday and I spot CT'd last night, belly and thighs. That is so easy - I kinda feel lazy by doing it that way. Can't be good as the tub but hopefully not a total waste of time.

Supps still the same. Been eating a LOT more fish and shellfish. Drs. orders you know! My brother is taking us salmon fishing Sunday. We leave from his house at 4 am. Will be a long day but fun. This will stock my freezer for almost a year if he gives us his catch and they actually bite. Will be a nap day for sure. Guess I better go get ready for work now.

### vkiernan — 2012-07-18T20:46:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-39103>

Wednesday, July 18th

Not much new today. Dh was restless last night and of course it affected me. Doing ok though. Still tired especially in the eyes. I sure wish I understood this. Can I really be this tired all the time???? Yawn, yawn, yawn all day long.

I am eating a lot more shrimp and fish and had some with my BAB which this morning was 2 eggs, shrimp, sausage, bacon and leftover beef tenderloin all cooked up in co. I love salmon when it has not been over cooked but actually slightly undercooked. Over cooking changes the flavor. I am thinking the food bill is now going up if I am adding this to my daily regime. Glad dh loves seafood in general too.

Spot ct'd again last night for an hour or so. Still so easy, hope it doesn't make me lazy to not do the tub which has to be a lot better. Really need to buy ice and try the deep CT.

Based on the good doc's advice to retrain my brain, I am eating salt everytime I look at the candy dish at work. I look at the candy and go to my desk and put a taste of salt on my tongue. He says I got to change my brain from liking sweet. Hopefully I am doing what he intended me to and not screwing his directions up. I do believe it will work. Kinda like I keep moving the garbage can around in the kitchen depending where I am cooking at and a lot of times I really have to think where I left it. But, I am now thinking before habitually moving in a specific direction. I am also backing off the stevia in my tea.

Had a really nice piece of salmon and mashed cauli w/co, co milk and sauteed garlic and sea salt. It is sooo good together. Let's see how long this will last me today. I am really full, probably shouldn't have eaten so much m. cauli. Finally got some decaf green tea and have been drinking a lot of it also at the good doc's advice.

Still need to make notes from my last consult. I need to get thru my son's wedding then I will have a little time. I need to go hard at it real soon to get the place in order for his rehearsal dinner.

DHEA 25 w/BAB

Preg. 100 mg w/BAB and 60 at lunch

Armour 2 gr. early am plus 1 enzyme

DIM (estrogen dom.), Silymarin (liver detox), Cq10

1 Enzyme w/BAB, mid morn, lunch, afternoon, supper and before bed if I remember.

1 mag l-threonate, 2 citrate (sometimes I just mix them up and take glyconate too)

L-glutamine 3g 2x day away from food

maca 1 T

Seacure (out)

L-Reuteri

DGL Licorice

### [email redacted] — 2012-07-19T16:58:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-39343>

Just catching up. The reason decaf coffee is a no is caffeine protects the coffee beans from getting moldy. Bulletproof exec has blogged on this. I've got two and a half bags of his coffee in the freezer but haven't been in the mood for it, which is unheard of for me. I haven't been drinking as much tea but I read dr K say that your fluids during the day should be half water half green or black tea. I still can't drink green tea. Makes me so sick. Even decaf. I bought matcha and was drinking that but actually felt more tired on it. Maybe I should drink it w dinner? Lol I love red tea and it is supposedly non- dehydrating. My friend gave me a Japanese tea - kukicha. Not sure if I like it or not.

### Souldanzer — 2012-07-19T18:18:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-39363>

### Souldanzer — 2012-07-19T18:22:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-39366>

> **vkiernan;39505 wrote:** I agree with you on green tea. I wouldn't feel so bad about drinking the stuff if I could let go of my morning coffee. Then at least I wouldn't be having so much caffeine. I really need to take better care of my wounded adrenals. I have had Yerba Mate and it is ok but I still prefer my morning coffee. Inspiration? Thanks you just made my day!

I've taken the no-caffeine at all plunge a few times now and I think it's one of the best things you can possibly do for your adrenals. Every time you put caffeine in your body with week adrenals you overexert them again and damage them a bit more. I notice that now even though at times I feel tired, I have re-trained my brain to ask for sleep instead of caffeine. I'm not sure that is possible if you still respond with caffeine to help you function even just once a day. The only caffeine right now I get is from minute amounts from my homemade Kombucha which I make almost caffeine free (a tiny bit like 1 green tea bag per gallon to keep the culture alive, it's not as good as with the real tea but I figure eventually I will be able to have the real thing again).

Putting caffeine into my body now when I am tired appears very counter-intuitive - b/c that would wake me up!!

### vkiernan — 2012-07-19T20:43:40+0300

Thursday, July 19th

Tired, tired and more tired. It is dreary but come on. This is ridiculous. I want to go home and nap. That is all! Started taking my HC again but in small doses to see if I get any relief from this tiredness that plagues me. My sleep is not bad either. 2.5 weeks for the new doc. I told my dh if I bomb with her, it is time for Tenn. Enough buying supps and spending on new docs who don't get me any further. Time to xxxx or get off the pot. I want some energy and cheeriness! I even started taking progesterone that I had. I have 10 refills so it will get a long way down the path if need be.

CT'd last night for about 25 min. at 55. Was a cold one for sure. No time tonight but will spot CT. Ate a large piece of salmon for lunch. It was good. I really like it slightly undercooked. Very mild flavor. I think a spinkle of balsamic vinegar on it would be delish too.

### vkiernan — 2012-07-20T14:28:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-39639>

Friday, July 20th

Ok, ditched the coffe this am but I am drinking the yerba mate w/co and it is not bad at all. Not too happy but will survive especially if I quit crashing every day. The sun is back today. Yeah. I am eating my BAB and it is shining in my eyes. Love it. I feel ok, but still tired in the eyes and now could go back to bed - probably wouldn't be able to sleep though. I really don't understand that. Must be a question for Jack. I bombed really bad yesterday at work. I needed a nap. Maybe I have to come home at lunch and start doing that. I don't want to make a habit of it though and have to rely on that every day. Too much gas and time wasted driving to and fro.

Didn't spot CT last night. Got home at 8 and read for a bit and went to bed at 9. Will try tonight. I have a massage at 4 so I think after I eat, CT in the tub would be good and taking my DIM then too since a lot of toxins should be flowing.

I have some Roobois red tea and was reading the label and it says it is as good or better than green tea and no caffeine. I don't like how it makes my stomach feel but I might be able to drink 1 a day and have some green tea too.

Need to add, I was backed up so to speak and decided that maybe I should give HCL another try since I had to quit taking it several months ago. Holy cow, still don't need it. Worked very well. This means some good things have happened. I use to take about 11-15 HCL a day. Now I need 1 or none. I'll take that positive for sure.

Supps the same.

Just want to add that yesterday I was unbelievably tired and could not tolerate the cold. I normally run my truck a/c on 60 and blasting but I had turn it up to 70 and turn down the blast. So strange. Just don't know what my body was telling me.

### vkiernan — 2012-07-23T03:42:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-40332>

Sunday, July 22nd

Went salmon fishing today and between 4 of us we caught about 200 lbs worth in 11 fish. It was a great day and we all soaked up some sun in the process. Not sure how many meals that equated to but it was a lot after we cleaned them all and bagged them up. We will be eating it for a year or until we run out. Really tired though. We had to get up at 2:30 in the am and of course one never sleeps when knowing the night will be short and you cannot oversleep. Bro will be angry if we don't get going EARLY!

Mood wise is still pretty good. Hope it stays for a bit. Not much else to report besides I think I am just too tired. Will hit the hay early tonight. Oh, I did make ghee. Think it turned out pretty good. Also found pink shoes to wear to my son's wedding. My dress is grey. How about that! I really like them. Hope I am not too old to wear this combo. Didn't get my kombucha stuff cuz after shopping for wedding stuff, I was too pooped and didn't want to walk thru another store so I went home. Surprising, by the time I got home (it was almost an hour drive) I actually found some more energy to do some things I needed like laundry, making the ghee, cooking up some bacon for BABs, etc. Felt really good and wasn't tired by 8 which was a bummer cuz I needed to sleep. The one time I need to be tired, I'm not. Oh well, if it continues that is a very good thing.

### vkiernan — 2012-07-24T14:37:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-40642>

Tuesday, July 24th

Somehow yesterday got a little moody and sorta lost it when talking to dh about going to Tenn. I get the impression that it is all about money. Perhaps I am reading him wrong or he is just overexaggerating because that is what he does. Yes, this will cost money but how long do I put my life on hold. I've got to get this figured out and I need the good doc to do it. Bits and pieces from this doc and that doc is BS!

I put my "fat" pants on yesterday and they fit too well. Means I have a problem. Breast tenderness is coming back too but not with full vengence like before. I started the prog. cream a week ago and wonder if that is my problem. Maybe I am one who cannot take it or I need more. I am dosing about 40 gms am and 40 pm at bed.

Took the afternoon off to start my deep house cleaning for my ds's wedding. Got all of my windows sills, grates and frames done. The window washers will be coming next week. I tried cleaning them once and they got streaked. That's when I hung up that idea. $200 for someone else to do this work is fine by me. That is why I work 2 jobs afterall. As long as I keep a pace now, I won't be quite so exhausted when the day rolls around.

It is finally raining here and is supposed to rain all week. We have been in severe drought and the poor farmers's crops aren't going to make it. Very sad. Our lawns are brown and the leaves are falling off the trees as they go dormant to protect themselves. Can't remember when we last mowed lawn. Not normal at all for WI.

CT'ing or the thought of it has been hard lately. I have spot ct'd more than anything and maybe that is my problem. I can't seem to tolerate the cold like I was. When I can't run the air on in my truck at 60 there is a problem. Maybe I should just go do that right now and be done with it; afterall, I have a webinar tonight!  Ok, off to CT!

### vkiernan — 2012-07-25T20:35:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-41047>

Wednesday, July 25th

Today is a pretty good day overall. I have to reflect on the fact that I am NOT yawning all day and haven't been since last Friday the 20th. That is when all my tiredness starting going away. Prior to that, I was yawning all day and my nose was sniffly for about 2 weeks. Kinda strange but that is my reality. I worked Monday afternoon at home and that was after my fishing event on Sunday where I was sleep deprived. So the fact that I could go fishing, take care of all of that and clean on Monday was pretty surprising to me. Not even sore form hauling in the lunkers or cleaning house. Hmmm, nice change. Hoping that continues.

Ok, another problem of course, my pants really are tighter than they should be. I have been off the HC for about a good month now. I have taken it just a few times here or there when really tired or stressed but nothing significant. Why is the weight not coming off???? I don't really think I eat too much. Wondering about my hormone status due to CT'ing. I thought I initially lost a lb. from CT'ing and then gained about 5 from HC. Maybe I just don't know why the weight flexed like it has. Perhaps the progesterone cream is doing something negative. Yet another problem, once last week and now this week I have had diarr.... and I never have this problem. Is it the increased seafood changing my guf flora in a good way? Might have to drop the mag citrate if this continues.

Supps all the same except stopping reg. DHEA and using 7-keto. Got some acne and that is not normal either. Been getting it since using the DHEA.

Wanted to add 1 more thing, the last 2 days I have gotten "stuffed" from eating my lunch. Smoked salmon and small green salad. Might need to back off on the salmon. It was yummy though.

### janagram — 2012-07-25T21:57:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-41064>

hmm, I had that sniffly nose thing too...it was atypical. I quit dhea also and bought some 7 keto....have taken sporadically. All these little changes must be for the good...

### vkiernan — 2012-07-26T20:44:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-41286>

Thursday, July 26th

Got some good sleep last night. Felt pretty good waking up. Mood is ok. I want to know why when I get hungry, it fricken hits me and makes me cranky. Sure, it is probably a blood sugar thing but after all this time???? Shouldn't things be better by now? What do I have to change to change this? I am such a bear when it is time to eat. It is not always like this but the majority of the time it is. I don't even want to go anywhere after work cuz I know I will get hungry and be screwed. This is affecting my life. Gotta be something I can change... Any ideas anyone?

Have done my CT's last couple of days. I am going to add some ice tonight. Should buy some and see what happens when I really get it cold like 40. Wonder if I can go longer than my wimpy 30 minutes. This morning I took a cool shower and when I was getting dressed afterwards, I was heating up and getting down right hot and the temp in the bedroom and bathroom is around 64. Wonder if this is the result from CT'ing. I do warm up in the tub after a few minutes. Has to be a good thing anyway.

Still doing the prog. cream. So far so good.

Ate smoked salmon, green salad, sauerkraut and kombucha for lunch. That smoked salmon is very good. I love the greasy feel of oily meat.

### Souldanzer — 2012-07-26T23:50:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-41351>

no ideas.... I still get that sometimes. The good thing is that I only get is once a day now.... before dinner if at all. And it's usually when I've been out and hungry for a little while. Then I get home and need food NOW. But - nothing compared to the bitch I used to be every couple of hours on my CW registered dietitian feeding plan! OMG. I was terrible to be around. My ex used to carry snacks for me. And then I'd get scolded for not being "prepared" or eating the "wrong" thing..... who wouldn't choose a candy bar when your BG is in the basement??

### vkiernan — 2012-07-26T23:52:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-41352>

You totally understand where I am coming from. Gotta be a fix for this crap! My dh can go all day without eating and never be anywhere near as cranky as I get.

### Souldanzer — 2012-07-27T01:04:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-41374>

Most days I don't eat lunch anymore and am fine like that. I noticed that I had to push through those feelings at times to get my body to "fix" it. Like, if your BG goes low and you always give it food right then and there, your body doesn't see a reason to do it differently. Once I said "no" every once in a while, eventually my body figured out that when my BG goes low, it need to mobilize fat!!

### vkiernan — 2012-07-27T01:09:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-41380>

For real, huh? You know there are times that I have to do this like last night due to work. I would have to hold off everyday for lunch and not eat until later like 2 or 3 to teach body something and then not eat dinner. There are times on the weekends when I am busy and am fine. No rhyme or reason the way I see it. Good question for Jack in my next consult.

### vkiernan — 2012-07-30T14:44:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-41921>

Monday, July 30th

Well the month is almost over. Time is flying. This is my last week to get my house in order before Friday. The dh and I worked pretty hard this weekend. I have to say I am amazed. I completely scrubbed the garage walls down myself which also involved going up and down a ladder many times. Big garage, huge project. The next day I weeded what we call the "North" bed. We have several flower beds. It is big is all I can say. Then I started cleaning house and finally got the dirty grout in the dh's bathroom scrubbed white again. We will be sealing it for sure. Looks beautiful! I cannot express how happy this makes me. Then helped the dh scrub the garage floor. WOW, how can I do all this? I have to be getting better. My back hurt yesterday so I iced it. I also CT'd 2x yesterday am and pm. My hands hurt the worst today but other than that I am doing good which is amazing in itself. CT has to be the new miracle drug. I'm pretty sure that is what is making my difference. I usually would be completely fried after a morning of cleaning house; so I am impressed and very grateful. Hell, I might just get to dance at my son's wedding and enjoy it.

Don't know what is going on. Think it was tom but breasts are still tender. Don't know why that would be. Is the prog. making a little break thru bleeding? I was cranky a little last week so it makes sense I just don't understand the soreness not being gone yet. Should be going away by now since that was Friday night. Don't know whether to use anymore prog. cream or not. I haven't been the last 2 days so I will see where it goes another day without it.

Would be great if I could lose a lb. before Saturday. Do I need to just eat a lot less? I don't eat much after BAB, but maybe it is still too much. Damn HC!

### Souldanzer — 2012-07-30T19:03:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-41948>

> Would be great if I could lose a lb. before Saturday. Do I need to just eat a lot less? I don't eat much after BAB, but maybe it is still too much. Damn HC!

I wouldn't suggest you do that. A lb is not worth the damage your body is going to sustain from significantly restricting your food intake. You'll gain back two pounds more in the process and I'm assuming that's not the goal either.

Hang in there..... healing takes a while. Great for the energy progress! Now you \*can\* dance at the wedding.... you won't even remember that lb once you're there

### vkiernan — 2012-07-30T20:11:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-41957>

> **Souldanzer;42190 wrote:** I wouldn't suggest you do that. A lb is not worth the damage your body is going to sustain from significantly restricting your food intake. You'll gain back two pounds more in the process and I'm assuming that's not the goal either.
>
>
>
> Hang in there..... healing takes a while. Great for the energy progress! Now you \*can\* dance at the wedding.... you won't even remember that lb once you're there

You are so right. It just sucks that I've held my weight for a couple of years and now it is up. But, my dh had a thought about that this am, perhaps I actually gained weight because I might be absorbing my food finally and maybe that is why the energy has been there. So, I am going off that premise and won't worry about it. When my daughter was diagnosed with Celiac, she gained weight too after quitting the grains. I am almost 50 and if my belly can't stick just a little, them screw em all.

### vkiernan — 2012-07-31T14:51:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42034>

Tuesday, July 31st

I had a nasty hormonal headache last night. Progressively got worse. Haven't had 1 in a while. Sure didn't miss them either. Feeling much better today and the b sore ness is going away. Wonder why all of this is coming back after being gone for a while? Mood is good today too. Got fairly good sleep yesterday. Went to the chiro yesterday and he cracked the heck out of my neck. Glad I went. Should feel better today.

### vkiernan — 2012-08-02T04:23:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42424>

Wednesday, Aug. 1st

Ate dinner about 9pm last night due to out shopping for stuff for son's wedding. Went to bed around 10:30 and was stuffed but slept ok anyway. Woke up at 6 and made BAB but knew I wasn't hungry. Ate as much as I could anyway. Didn't take long for the nausea, etc. to set in. So far is still going. Sure hope I can sleep and tomorrow is a better day. I have a lot of work to do at home for preparation. I was just starting to have energy and feel pretty good. Why does xxxt happen???

### vkiernan — 2012-08-02T15:30:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42486>

Thanks PCG for stopping by. How do you spell your name anyway? My daughter is "Mandie." That good attitude waxes and wanes. Yesterday when my gut was REALLY bloated, my attitude sucked but today so far it is better so I can be a little better about this situation. But Soul is right. I believe you have your big wedding this weekend too? I am so excited for my son but wanted to look perfect for him - you know! I'm sure you feel the same. I guess all we can do is have a really good time and just not worry about. People will concentrate on us for being happy than if we were grumpy. Happy attitudes always draw favorable attention!!!! Ok, my rant is over and I have convinced myself that I am ok no matter how I look. Afterall, it isn't about me anyway.

Feeling better so far today but weak and tired. I will take that over yesterday anyday. Got to go get to work now and get this place cleaned up for the festivities this weekend.

### Souldanzer — 2012-08-02T22:02:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42552>

While I was re-feeding (and even to this day) there is some people who notoriously are focused on the size of my body. It is usually the ones who have a problem with food themselves. And then there was a whole lot of people/friends who plain could not pinpoint what was happening to me..... they couldn't see the gradual weight gain.... but they kept pointing out to me how I was changing on the inside, in a good way, how my eyes started to have a sparkle in them again, how I was smiling and laughing so much more, how I was much nicer to be around in general.

It's what happens on the inside that matters. Your body is just a vehicle.... you're borrowing this means of being for a little while. It gets you around, it processes your fuel (hormone information) for you, it allows you to \*be\*. But in reality - that's not what people perceive when they meet you, spend time with you, cherish you. In fact, it matters surprisingly little.

### vkiernan — 2012-08-02T23:48:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42572>

What I find interesting is that I am that way with others just as you described. It is NOT their body size that matters. It is about the person. My dh said to me that as long as I am feeling better a few lbs are fine; my response to him was you and I both know you don't like fat girls.

What is hard for me is he makes comments about obese people and I take it personally even though I only weigh 125. I am so afraid of gaining weight. My ex did the same thing - made comments. What is it about these guys? Their moms were slim but my mom and dad were obese. 200 and 300 respectively. My dad is no longer obese. He had a whacked out thyroid for years and didn't know it. Now we can't keep the weight on him. Anyway, got sidetracked. I have to believe it doesn't bother me cuz I grew up with it. I sure wish I could just let it go.

Here is another situation that is bugging the piss out of me, my sister (who weighs about 105) flirts with my dh. Totally disgusts me. I'm sure she will be doing it at my son's wedding this weekend. She used to be my best sis but not anymore. I don't quite know how to tell her to knock it off. I have made a few comments and she denies them. My brothers have witnessed it too so I know it is not just my hormones. He is a nice guy as well as a salesman and will talk with anyone. So when she comes over, if he is outside, that is where she is. I do my best to not invite her anymore to anything cuz I just can't take it.

### ealachan — 2012-08-03T00:00:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42573>

Not to stick my nose into your personal business, and I hope this doesn't offend you, but...have you ever thought of seeing a marriage counselor, either with DH or without, about some of the issues in your post above? I don't know your DH or the comments he makes about obese people, but it's not right of him to make you feel like crap about yourself EVER, and especially not when you're at a healthy weight. Even if he's making comments about others but not directly at you, his continual putting-down of people can negatively affect you, and that's not ok.

Like I said, I don't know him or what he's doing / saying, but from just reading the snippet you wrote above, his behavior seems kinda dickish, and you don't deserve to have someone putting you down all the time, either directly or indirectly.

### vkiernan — 2012-08-03T01:11:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42578>

I always appreciate other's views and actually look forward to them. I know with my hormones the way they are, a lot of it is me and feedback helps for sure. So thanks. He doesn't put "me" down per say but the fact that he says what he does, does bother me. He learned a lot of bad habits from his dad and you can't erase them overnight but I am working on it. I would say he is a better person today but still has a long way to go. Yes, dickish is a good word for it. I did see a counselor but I was in the middle of AF and didn't even know it. No help for me. I need to get my hormones in balance before I ever seek it again. I would like to go to counseling cuz he does have a hard time helping me thru bad times. I can be very upset laying next to him and crying and it doesn't bother him a bit. Where does this come from??? Of course it is usually due to hormonal disruption and he knows it. But still!

### Souldanzer — 2012-08-03T01:28:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42581>

V, I think getting a counselor involved is probably a great idea. In addition, in my experience we create a lot of this ourselves.... people say these things b/c we allow it. If you have a zero tolerance for such comments then they will learn to stop. It has to do with self-esteem and how women present themselves.

There is a long way from a few lbs to fat..... and fat certainly is not the goal of this journey. Fat would be the indicator of something is wrong.

### Inger — 2012-08-03T09:01:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42642>

Vkiernan, my (ex)hubby was just like that.

Now we are divorcing, separated for a few months already. I do care for him still and we love each other in a special way, 13 years of marriage makes you grow together. But I am so happy now. Hubby used to make comments on quite slim girls that they are fat asses and such. It felt so bad because they was not fat in my eyes at all. I think he found me perfect when I weiged 46 kg / 166 cm which was too little (now I weigh almost 10 kg more..). My bones stuck out I can say. But I guess he liked womens without curves. He used to say my butt was like an earthball. I did not felt he really liked my body, we had not a great sex life eather. I had a lover for one year, years ago.. (after that, my hubby quit to comment on my fat butt.. I guess he realized he can actually loose me) and it was very passionate and beautiful, he loved every inch of my body and that felt like in heaven. He loved when women had curves. I am little sad that I did not stayed with him cause we was a perfect match.. but I could not leave hubby, I just could not. He wanted me to be his wife still after I told about my lover. So I had to quit the most beatiful relatioship I ever had.. I felt like dying and had no appetit for 2 weeks after that - food tasted like paper to me (which is huge as I always have a very healthy appetite).

I am happy with my body that is not the thinnest but I like it. I guess there are something not ok with mens brain that likes anorectics. Sometimes I got scary thoughts if it was a kind of pedofilia.. to like women that looks like girls.. I can tell you these thoughts scared me. My ex also had not much time for me the last years, just like yours. It hurted a bit. Then it come out he had a relationship with another woman. I moved out because he asked me too. A week after me moving out he do wanted us to be together again but no.. I am happy now. I need time to figure out myself and heal and I am not going back to that what was. So, now I live alone and heal myself and it feels so good. I sleep so much better, I could not sleep cause hubby was waking me up too! Turning around.. going for a smoke.. uh it was terrible. He abused alcohol too, not always but enough to make it a real problem.

I am not afraid to be alone anymore, because I was before. I guess the Kruse-Protocol has changed me somehow. I am not afraid for spiders eather at all anymore?! Huh? I can let them walk on me and feel not disgusted at all! I like this!

Sure it was hard first, to move out from my home, my dear, beautiful home that I loved.. and the man I was used too. It hurted big time. I cried so much the weeks after.. just cried loud out alone in my bed.. all the dark sadness and grief that was inside me. But little by little the pain diminished. Now I am almost over it. If the pain comes I let it come and I cry. I think about the sun and the wind how beautigful they are, I look up at blue sky and the green trees. I think about beautiful moments in my life, beautiful people I know and love. It helps always. I know I am on the way to the light. Me and hubby are good friends still and he is very kind to me, he is alone too now. Helps me always when I need help and comes over for coffee at times. I am so happy how things are now.

And I was so scared to begin with.. but I jumped. I just jumped out in the unknown and decided it will all be good in the end even if it hurts now. It was my only chance to survive. I was happy that hubby wanted me to move out, not the other way. It felt so liberating. I do not needed to make the desiscion. Sure it hurted to be kicked out because of another woman but after all it was easier for me, I am not the kind of woman that have it easy to leave anyone.. huh.

I have no idea what will be in the future, if we will move together again (hubby wants that I guess), but I will never go back to what was. It was destroying me. A women needs to feel loved I guess. She needs to feel that her husband loves her body. Or something is not right..

Please do not try to control your hubby. Let him go if he wish. Love is freedom. It will be there if it is but you cannot demand it, ever. You can only give. Demands destroy love. Do not care if your sister is flirting with your hubby. If he goes on it then he just shows hes real face. It is always better to get the truth, even if it hurts. Only that bring us forwards, every thing else is stagnation. It might very well also be they have just fun together, as friends! Let him do and let him show who he are. Listen to your heart, not to what others say. Do the right things yourself always and be honest. That gives you a lot of power. Love and give without demanding anything back. You will get happiness and love and that is what we all want, isn't it! And.. take good care about yourself. That is when we need to be egoistic, we need to give ourselves love! Because we cannot await to get it from anyone else! That is why.

Vkiernan, I so wish you could work less. I am sure such a big workload makes your healing very slow. I can tell from experience. I work only 2-3 days a week now, on purpose. I have money just for food nothing else but I know I need free time to heal. People are too stressed out these times.. it is sad. It is possible to live with much less stuff. I live by my parents, have no car, nothing. But I am getting healthy fast. And I feel so very happy, I enjoy every day. I am out in the sun, I love the sun and the air on my skin. If I worked much I could not enjoy all this.

If you could stay home and your hubby could work it would be just ideal. There is so much in a household to do for a wife, and you would get well so much faster! You could tan every day in the garden, which is so very good for your hormones too! But sure.. I know for many this would be not possible if they have loans on their house's to pay and stuff.

But there will be a way Vkiernan, there always are. I am sure you will see it soon if you try to! I saw it too eventually, even if I first could not!

### ealachan — 2012-08-03T16:34:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42668>

> **vkiernan;42847 wrote:** I always appreciate other's views and actually look forward to them. I know with my hormones the way they are, a lot of it is me and feedback helps for sure. So thanks. He doesn't put "me" down per say but the fact that he says what he does, does bother me. He learned a lot of bad habits from his dad and you can't erase them overnight but I am working on it. I would say he is a better person today but still has a long way to go. Yes, dickish is a good word for it. I did see a counselor but I was in the middle of AF and didn't even know it. No help for me. I need to get my hormones in balance before I ever seek it again. I would like to go to counseling cuz he does have a hard time helping me thru bad times. I can be very upset laying next to him and crying and it doesn't bother him a bit. Where does this come from??? Of course it is usually due to hormonal disruption and he knows it. But still!

Sweetheart, just because your moods and feelings are affected by your hormones does NOT make those moods or feelings invalid in any way. Everyone will have highs and lows, whether they have well-adjusted hormones or not, and your spouse should be at least understanding and supportive of this, if not actively try to make you feel better when you're down. If he's making you feel bad when you're already down or just straight-up ignoring your issues when you communicate them to him, then that's not fair and it's not right. You deserve much better.

### Souldanzer — 2012-08-03T18:34:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42695>

**Inger;42918 wrote:** Vkiernan, my (ex)hubby was just like that.

Now we are divorcing, separated for a few months already. I do care for him still and we love each other in a special way, 13 years of marriage makes you grow together. But I am so happy now. Hubby used to make comments on quite slim girls that they are fat asses and such. It felt so bad because they was not fat in my eyes at all. I think he found me perfect when I weiged 46 kg / 166 cm which was too little (now I weigh almost 10 kg more..). My bones stuck out I can say. But I guess he liked womens without curves. He used to say my butt was like an earthball. I did not felt he really liked my body, we had not a great sex life eather. I had a lover for one year, years ago.. (after that, my hubby quit to comment on my fat butt.. I guess he realized he can actually loose me) and it was very passionate and beautiful, he loved every inch of my body and that felt like in heaven. He loved when women had curves. I am little sad that I did not stayed with him cause we was a perfect match.. but I could not leave hubby, I just could not. He wanted me to be his wife still after I told about my lover. So I had to quit the most beatiful relatioship I ever had.. I felt like dying and had no appetit for 2 weeks after that - food tasted like paper to me (which is huge as I always have a very healthy appetite).

I am happy with my body that is not the thinnest but I like it. I guess there are something not ok with mens brain that likes anorectics. Sometimes I got scary thoughts if it was a kind of pedofilia.. to like women that looks like girls.. I can tell you these thoughts scared me. My ex also had not much time for me the last years, just like yours. It hurted a bit. Then it come out he had a relationship with another woman. I moved out because he asked me too. A week after me moving out he do wanted us to be together again but no.. I am happy now. I need time to figure out myself and heal and I am not going back to that what was. So, now I live alone and heal myself and it feels so good. I sleep so much better, I could not sleep cause hubby was waking me up too! Turning around.. going for a smoke.. uh it was terrible. He abused alcohol too, not always but enough to make it a real problem.

I am not afraid to be alone anymore, because I was before. I guess the Kruse-Protocol has changed me somehow. I am not afraid for spiders eather at all anymore?! Huh? I can let them walk on me and feel not disgusted at all! I like this!

Sure it was hard first, to move out from my home, my dear, beautiful home that I loved.. and the man I was used too. It hurted big time. I cried so much the weeks after.. just cried loud out alone in my bed.. all the dark sadness and grief that was inside me. But little by little the pain diminished. Now I am almost over it. If the pain comes I let it come and I cry. I think about the sun and the wind how beautigful they are, I look up at blue sky and the green trees. I think about beautiful moments in my life, beautiful people I know and love. It helps always. I know I am on the way to the light. Me and hubby are good friends still and he is very kind to me, he is alone too now. Helps me always when I need help and comes over for coffee at times. I am so happy how things are now.

And I was so scared to begin with.. but I jumped. I just jumped out in the unknown and decided it will all be good in the end even if it hurts now. It was my only chance to survive. I was happy that hubby wanted me to move out, not the other way. It felt so liberating. I do not needed to make the desiscion. Sure it hurted to be kicked out because of another woman but after all it was easier for me, I am not the kind of woman that have it easy to leave anyone.. huh.

I have no idea what will be in the future, if we will move together again (hubby wants that I guess), but I will never go back to what was. It was destroying me. A women needs to feel loved I guess. She needs to feel that her husband loves her body. Or something is not right..

Please do not try to control your hubby. Let him go if he wish. Love is freedom. It will be there if it is but you cannot demand it, ever. You can only give. Demands destroy love. Do not care if your sister is flirting with your hubby. If he goes on it then he just shows hes real face. It is always better to get the truth, even if it hurts. Only that bring us forwards, every thing else is stagnation. It might very well also be they have just fun together, as friends! Let him do and let him show who he are. Listen to your heart, not to what others say. Do the right things yourself always and be honest. That gives you a lot of power. Love and give without demanding anything back. You will get happiness and love and that is what we all want, isn't it! And.. take good care about yourself. That is when we need to be egoistic, we need to give ourselves love! Because we cannot await to get it from anyone else! That is why.

Vkiernan, I so wish you could work less. I am sure such a big workload makes your healing very slow. I can tell from experience. I work only 2-3 days a week now, on purpose. I have money just for food nothing else but I know I need free time to heal. People are too stressed out these times.. it is sad. It is possible to live with much less stuff. I live by my parents, have no car, nothing. But I am getting healthy fast. And I feel so very happy, I enjoy every day. I am out in the sun, I love the sun and the air on my skin. If I worked much I could not enjoy all this.

If you could stay home and your hubby could work it would be just ideal. There is so much in a household to do for a wife, and you would get well so much faster! You could tan every day in the garden, which is so very good for your hormones too! But sure.. I know for many this would be not possible if they have loans on their house's to pay and stuff.

But there will be a way Vkiernan, there always are. I am sure you will see it soon if you try to! I saw it too eventually, even if I first could not!

Wow, Inger..... gosh we have a lot in common. I left, too..... anyone want to know about types of personalities in men that will seek anorexic women, come talk to me. I'm good friends with my ex, too. He wanted me back, too! Never. Ever. He isn't really the anorexic seeking kinda guy, he met me when I was a pretty healthy weight. But he wasn't able to deal with me finding my strength, power, and ambition. My voice. That moment, things went bad. I try to refrain from suggesting to people who are working on self-improvement that they need to re-evaluate their relationship but the reality is..... if you grow that much inside with what you're doing.... and the partner isn't doing something equivalent.... at some point, the relationship might not be "enough" anymore. Because you've moved on to new grounds, you like them better, and your partner is still stuck somewhere in the past. That's actually what happened to my relationship. I was changing left and right (damn I needed to!!!) and my partner eventually told me "Soul, you're not the person I married anymore!!!". My reply: "Thank God. B/c that was a pretty miserable place to be!". Relationship never recovered from that conversation/argument. He wasn't ready to change, my life depended on change. Mismatch. He's a great guy.... but not for me. I need someone who loves change.... love to evolve....loves to grow on the inside. One of the things I really want in my next relationship is for there to be challenge to each other to evolve more, achieve more, in a reciprocative way.

I live similar to you, Inger. Minimal. It is such a freedom for a while to be able to focus on the important stuff.

> Please do not try to control your hubby. Let him go if he wish. Love is freedom

That is true, too, for you V. B/c you're the one who's asking for evolution and growth here. I'm not suggesting you leave anyone. I'm saying that no one has permission to control you and your choices, and you are allowed to soar and thrive with no one holding you back.

### Souldanzer — 2012-08-03T18:46:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42699>

> I can be very upset laying next to him and crying and it doesn't bother him a bit. Where does this come from???

It might be the other way around. It might bother him \*too much\* and he goes into denial. He might not be able to handle that kind of emotion. My ex and I did A LOT of marriage counseling work with regards to that. He just couldn't do it.... the way he grew up, emotions where scary to him and they needed to be "fixed" instead of "allowed". He'd do all these things to prevent me from experiencing them, when really what I needed was just an understanding shoulder to cry on..... I'll admit I needed it a little often during that time  Lot's of crying going on then.

### DarleenMB — 2012-08-04T18:35:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42848>

Here's my take on Souldanzer's response ... and it was a long time coming. Men need/want to FIX things. women need to talk them out. THAT is the main difference between us. I realized this the day I called DH to bitch about something. Midway through my tirade he said (in an extremely frustrated tone) "Well what do you want ME to do about it?"

I was stunned. My response was along the lines of "nothing ... I just wanted you to LISTEN."

So if your guy can't FIX what is bothering you it only frustrates him. And if your hubby is like mine it means he clams up and retreats into his "cave" even if that cave is only in his head.

sometimes I have to remind my guy that I only need a listening post. Just let me spew it out there. That's how \*I\* fix the things that are bothering me. I do not need him to do it unless I specifically ASK for his help.

Ya gotta tell them this over and over and over in as many different ways as you can think of until it finally sinks in. Either that or get a posse of women friends you can talk to ... THEY will understand without trying to fix everything.

### Souldanzer — 2012-08-04T19:06:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-42861>

Darleen, my ex and I had that conversation many times..... there's more to the story than I feel like putting on the internet. Let's just say clarifying what I needed didn't fix the problem. The guy's gotta want to do it/change.

### vkiernan — 2012-08-05T19:09:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-43078>

Ok all, I really appreciate all of your feedback and a couple of things really stood out to me. Soul and Darleen you both hit the nail on the head. He does clam up and not say a word because he "doesn't" know what to say or how to respond. This is a problem we both have to work on. I have to quit "bitching" (get my hormones fixed so I don't overreact or expect him to read my mind) and he has to put more into the relationship in terms of the things I need to make me feel loved like Shelby suggested. These things use to happen. I never felt so loved when I was first seeing him. Hell, I didn't know that kind of affection existed and really didn't even know how to handle it. Not sure if it stopped cuz I have drove him away with my hormone issue (bxxxx, bxxxx) or if he is just getting older and he just doesn't have enough energy for the both of us or he just doesn't realize marriage takes a lot of give and you have to keep at it. I do know his hormones are tanked but he is not ready to do something about it. He is verbally very nice to me. I just need more physical attention like more hugs and kisses. I don't really blame him for backing off if that is what it is as I have been quite bitchy/emotional for a couple years. Of course none of this has been something I "chose" to do but just my damn messed up hormones. He also was married to a bxxxx prior to me. Kinda sucks for him to have to go thru it again with me but I am working as fast and hard as I can to fix myself. He knows this but I think he doesn't really know personally how hard it is to do. He is the man for me regardless of his thoughts about "obese" people. I am working on that. I lived the life of a bad marriage for 24 years with my ex. That was one messed up relationship. I ended up in this relationship because that one was so bad. This marriage is the exact opposite. My first marriage probably caused my adrenal fatigue and I am dealing with the results of it. Going thru divorce must have put me over the edge and I am now trying to fix it. Life is getting better for me but when it is pms time, I go crazy and can't change my thoughts.

I believe most "hormonally balanced" people can ask for what they want and receive it. I, on the other hand, sort of clam up and expect him to just give it to me. I cannot ask for anything or just walk up and hug him if my hormones are on the blink. I have a lot of things to work on. I go into this self-pity mode of "oh, he doesn't love me, blah, blah, blah and I retreat completely!!! See, I do realize this is not all his fault by any means. I have to get myself fixed and then work on rebuilding my marriage. It is great to have all this feedback out here to reread. Now, if you all have ideas for me to swing myself around and start asking for what I want, that would be great. Seems when I am pms'ing I can't change my thoughts to even be rational. I try to ask myself how I would feel if my spouse treated me the way I treat him. I'm sure counseling would help me once I am stabile and not emotionally wrecked half the month.

### ealachan — 2012-08-05T19:27:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-43085>

In terms of advice on how to ask for what you want, all I can say is that I have to sometimes remind myself that my husband is not a mind-reader. Sometimes he reminds me, too... But seriously...no one can hear what's going on in your head except you. If you're sitting there thinking "man, I could really use a hug", try just saying it out loud. Maybe just to yourself at first, to get used to how it sounds...then say it to your DH. If he can't be arsed to give you a hug when you ask, then there's a problem...but he doesn't sound like that kind of guy, from what you've written.

Do you take DIM at all? I've noticed a big difference in my PMS since I upped my vitamin d3 and started taking DIM...but everyone is different.

Hang in there!

### vkiernan — 2012-08-05T19:40:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-43087>

Exactly on what you've wrote. Yes I have been taking DIM and silymarin since last fall actually. My problem is I am an estrogen collector and have been my whole life. I am very low on prog. and need supplementation to get my ratio in line. I am really broken and it is going to take a long time to fix and even Dr. K has reminded me of that. But, I am on the mend for sure. My dark days aren't nearly as dark so I know it is all working. I have to tell you I have had 2 weekends of working physically hard around the house in prep for my son's wedding festivities that were held here this weekend and I was minimally sore. I danced a lot last night and am walking way better than I thought and again am not really sore. I am tired from getting home at 1 in the am but not wiped out. I will be excited to do an ASI assay. It has to be working. I remember after stopping the HC I had a few rough weeks of complete tiredness then 1 day it was a lot better and then even more better after that. Perhaps the 2 months on the stuff really gave my adrenals a break and now they are working. I have to think if I still had very low cortisol that I would be wiped after all of this and I am clearly not. Last night was funny, after taking a small break from dancing I went back out there and felt an energy surge. It was a great time.

You are so right on the mind reader aspect. I am going to start saying to myself "he is not a mind reader." That is a simple line that might just help and especially if I engrain it. I think we are both sort of stuck in a rut and have developed a pattern albeit a not very good one. He never knows on any given day what I might be like and I am in the rut of he doesn't love, etc. so we do need to do something to break it.

### Souldanzer — 2012-08-05T21:32:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-43101>

V, there is a very popular exercise in couples therapy. Take it FWIW....

Make a list of all the things you need from your partner, put them in order of importance. Things you can't live without go on top. It's best if your partner will do the same b/c you think you might now what is important to him.... and you might be entirely off.

The success or failure of a marriage is very dependent on the "positive" outweighing the "negative". The totals don't matter so much. You can have a hell of a lot of "negative", if there is a stack of positive as well.... the couple will experience things as going well, and committed to each other.

So, once you have your lists, I'd suggest you look over your hubby's list. You then pick one thing, no matter where on the importance scale, one small thing that will fulfill one of his (unmet) needs in a relationship. You go first. I know you're the one who feels like \*he\* isn't doing enough and this will be your risk investment. You go first. You start fulfilling those needs on that list to the best of your ability while you work on overcoming any resentment you might harbor. Don't worry if there's stuff on there you just cannot do at this point in time.

He will come around. He will feel that you love him and are invested in the relationship and don't mind putting some work into it. Hopefully you two trust each other enough that you both can share your lists with each other and more likely than not, he will start to at least attempt to fulfill some of yours. Watch a man come around and work at keeping his woman if he is getting more and more of \*his\* needs fulfilled....

There can be a lot of communication going on while doing this exercise or he doesn't even need to know about it.... as long as you can figure out some of his unmet needs. I've tested this one... works on a lot of people, not just husbands

Reread your instructions. Not quite what I was thinking you were saying. So - you are saying to have him give me his list and I work on his unmet needs first? Or? I'm totally open to this.

### vkiernan — 2012-08-06T14:52:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-43184>

Monday, Aug. 6th

The wedding was fantastic!!! It was sooo beautiful. My new daughter-in-law has very exquisite taste. My dress fit great and I wore my pink shoes. My belly bloat and that nastiness that was going on right before all subsided and I looked pretty darn good for a mother of the groom. Even got a few compliments which was really nice to hear. I danced a lot and it felt good; well, except my feet after a while but that is why we all take them off after a bit. I even got to dance with my son and tell him how great of a person he turned out to be. He had tears in his eyes and then I did too. It was a sweet spot in the night for sure. I am still not sore from all the dancing muscle wise but my hip joints hurt. My problem with dancing is my hips move a LOT and then my joints hurt. Maybe I just need to dance more.

Man did I sleep like a rock last night. Thankfully I woke at 5:50 just in time to get up and get on with my day. Good thing I slept well as it is periond end and auditors will be in so it will be a very busy week. Boss is also back. More stress but will manage somehow. Can't let this stress me out and do bad things to me.

See my new doc tomorrow. Got to figure out the best approach to get what I want. I need all the releasing hormones tested to rule out panhypopituitarism. I am also still waiting on my GI Effects test. Been over 3 weeks now. I want my 3rd consult with Jack. Good things are happening or I would not be able to the things I am doing. I want to know what progress I am making and why. I am starting to feel a little human and am loving it.

Still taking all my supps that I have been except stopping the DHEA due to acne and ran out of pregnenolone. Got to get more of that. Will still use my face cream that has a little DHEA in it. Don't know if I am absorbing it but it feels wonderful on my skin anyway.

### Jack Kruse — 2012-08-06T15:36:52+0300

**Inger;42918 wrote:** Vkiernan, my (ex)hubby was just like that.

Now we are divorcing, separated for a few months already. I do care for him still and we love each other in a special way, 13 years of marriage makes you grow together. But I am so happy now. Hubby used to make comments on quite slim girls that they are fat asses and such. It felt so bad because they was not fat in my eyes at all. I think he found me perfect when I weiged 46 kg / 166 cm which was too little (now I weigh almost 10 kg more..). My bones stuck out I can say. But I guess he liked womens without curves. He used to say my butt was like an earthball. I did not felt he really liked my body, we had not a great sex life eather. I had a lover for one year, years ago.. (after that, my hubby quit to comment on my fat butt.. I guess he realized he can actually loose me) and it was very passionate and beautiful, he loved every inch of my body and that felt like in heaven. He loved when women had curves. I am little sad that I did not stayed with him cause we was a perfect match.. but I could not leave hubby, I just could not. He wanted me to be his wife still after I told about my lover. So I had to quit the most beatiful relatioship I ever had.. I felt like dying and had no appetit for 2 weeks after that - food tasted like paper to me (which is huge as I always have a very healthy appetite).

I am happy with my body that is not the thinnest but I like it. I guess there are something not ok with mens brain that likes anorectics. Sometimes I got scary thoughts if it was a kind of pedofilia.. to like women that looks like girls.. I can tell you these thoughts scared me. My ex also had not much time for me the last years, just like yours. It hurted a bit. Then it come out he had a relationship with another woman. I moved out because he asked me too. A week after me moving out he do wanted us to be together again but no.. I am happy now. I need time to figure out myself and heal and I am not going back to that what was. So, now I live alone and heal myself and it feels so good. I sleep so much better, I could not sleep cause hubby was waking me up too! Turning around.. going for a smoke.. uh it was terrible. He abused alcohol too, not always but enough to make it a real problem.

I am not afraid to be alone anymore, because I was before. I guess the Kruse-Protocol has changed me somehow. I am not afraid for spiders eather at all anymore?! Huh? I can let them walk on me and feel not disgusted at all! I like this!

Sure it was hard first, to move out from my home, my dear, beautiful home that I loved.. and the man I was used too. It hurted big time. I cried so much the weeks after.. just cried loud out alone in my bed.. all the dark sadness and grief that was inside me. But little by little the pain diminished. Now I am almost over it. If the pain comes I let it come and I cry. I think about the sun and the wind how beautigful they are, I look up at blue sky and the green trees. I think about beautiful moments in my life, beautiful people I know and love. It helps always. I know I am on the way to the light. Me and hubby are good friends still and he is very kind to me, he is alone too now. Helps me always when I need help and comes over for coffee at times. I am so happy how things are now.

And I was so scared to begin with.. but I jumped. I just jumped out in the unknown and decided it will all be good in the end even if it hurts now. It was my only chance to survive. I was happy that hubby wanted me to move out, not the other way. It felt so liberating. I do not needed to make the desiscion. Sure it hurted to be kicked out because of another woman but after all it was easier for me, I am not the kind of woman that have it easy to leave anyone.. huh.

I have no idea what will be in the future, if we will move together again (hubby wants that I guess), but I will never go back to what was. It was destroying me. A women needs to feel loved I guess. She needs to feel that her husband loves her body. Or something is not right..

Please do not try to control your hubby. Let him go if he wish. Love is freedom. It will be there if it is but you cannot demand it, ever. You can only give. Demands destroy love. Do not care if your sister is flirting with your hubby. If he goes on it then he just shows hes real face. It is always better to get the truth, even if it hurts. Only that bring us forwards, every thing else is stagnation. It might very well also be they have just fun together, as friends! Let him do and let him show who he are. Listen to your heart, not to what others say. Do the right things yourself always and be honest. That gives you a lot of power. Love and give without demanding anything back. You will get happiness and love and that is what we all want, isn't it! And.. take good care about yourself. That is when we need to be egoistic, we need to give ourselves love! Because we cannot await to get it from anyone else! That is why.

Vkiernan, I so wish you could work less. I am sure such a big workload makes your healing very slow. I can tell from experience. I work only 2-3 days a week now, on purpose. I have money just for food nothing else but I know I need free time to heal. People are too stressed out these times.. it is sad. It is possible to live with much less stuff. I live by my parents, have no car, nothing. But I am getting healthy fast. And I feel so very happy, I enjoy every day. I am out in the sun, I love the sun and the air on my skin. If I worked much I could not enjoy all this.

If you could stay home and your hubby could work it would be just ideal. There is so much in a household to do for a wife, and you would get well so much faster! You could tan every day in the garden, which is so very good for your hormones too! But sure.. I know for many this would be not possible if they have loans on their house's to pay and stuff.

But there will be a way Vkiernan, there always are. I am sure you will see it soon if you try to! I saw it too eventually, even if I first could not!
awesome post......

Range

Percentile Ranking by Quintile Consistency = Formed/Normal

Predominant Bacteria (E+007) E+007

Units and Reference Ranges

Organisms are detected by DNA analysis.

One colony forming unit (CFU) is equivalent to

one bacterium. Each genome detected

represents one cell, or one CFU. Results are

expressed in scientific notation, so an organism

reported as 2.5 E7 CFU/gram is read as 25

million colony forming units per gram of feces.

The cutoff for significance of Opportunistic

Bacteria has been set at 1.0E+ 005 (100,000).

These are levels above which clinically

significant growth may be present. Rather than

reporting semi-quantitative +1 to +4 levels, the

new methodology provides full quantitative

analysis.

Predominant Bacteria play major roles in

health. They provide colonization resistance

against potentially pathogenic organisms, aid in

digestion and absorption, produce vitamins and

SCFA's, and stimulate the GI immune system.

DNA probes allow detection of multiple species

(sp.) within a genus, so the genera that are

reported cover many species.

5.3 >= 1.1 1.7 7.7 Escherichia coli (E. coli) Â®

Opportunistic Bacteria

No clinically significant amounts.

Opportunistic Bacteria may cause

symptoms and be associated with disease.

They can affect digestion and absorption,

nutrient production, pH and immune state.

Antibiotic sensitivity tests will be performed on

all opportunistic bacteria found, although

clinical history is usually considered to

determine treatment since the organisms are

not generally considered to be pathogens.

\>100000 pg DNA/g.

Parasite present; taxonomy unavailable. Positive Neg

A taxonomy unavailable finding likely indicates an ingested protozoan and not a human parasite. It

does not indicate treatment unless patient symptoms and other inflammatory markers are consistent

with parasite infection.

Parasites

Parasite infections are a major cause of

non-viral diarrhea. Symptoms may include

constipation, gas, bloating, increased allergy

response, colitis, nausea and distention.

with increased caloric extraction from food.

Beneficial SCFA

Beneficial SCFA

Short chain fatty acids (SCFA) are

produced by bacterial fermentation of dietary

polysaccharides and fiber. The product,

N-butyrate, is taken up and used to sustain the

normal activity of colonic epithielial cells.

Butyrate has been shown to lower the risk of

colitis and colorectal cancer. A healthy balance

of GI microbes depends on production of SCFA

by one specie to allow the normal growth of

another one in a complex cross-feeding

network.

Total SCFA 34 L >= 35 53Â® mM/g

n-Butyrate 5.3 >= 3.9 5.2Â® mM/g

Inflammation

Inflammation

Lactoferrin, an iron-binding glycoprotein,

is released in IBD but not in non-inflammatory

IBS. High levels are found in Crohn's, UC or

infection. WBC's are elevated in general

inflammation/infection. Mucus is often

visualized in acute GI inflammation.

### vkiernan — 2012-08-07T20:16:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-43470>

So, bacteroidetes are good and firmicutes are bad per the following and it seems I need to work on my bacteria good and bad more aggressively than I have been!

> Bacteria and ObesityDoctors and researchers are hard at work trying to identify biological reasons why some people gain weight more easily than others, even when they eat similar food. The answer may be in your gut!
>
>
>
> Your gut is full of good bacteria (microflora) as well as bad bacteria and pathogens. Trillions of these organisms contribute to the proper functioning of your body, help you metabolize food, and protect you against illness.
>
>
>
> In today's world the bad bacteria often are out of control. Poor diet, stress, lack of sleep, or even antibiotics and other drugs can create an environment that encourages the growth of bad bacteria- leaving you susceptible to disease, weight gain and obesity.
>
>
>
> A recent study showed that normal weight people have more **Bacteroidetes bacteria in their stomach and intestines, while obese people have more Firmicutes bacteria**.2
>
>
>
> Researchers don't know if Firmicutes bacteria cause obesity or if obesity causes Firmicutes to grow, but the implications are huge: change the bacteria in your gut to change your body!3
>
>
>
> In fact, the same researchers have found that everyone's bodies actually extract different calorie amounts from the same exact food, depending on your own particular combination of intestinal microflora.
>
>
>
> For example, you and your friend could eat the same steak dinner, but depending on your gut flora, you could extract more calories from the same meal.3
>
>
>
> Seems unfair, right? Well read on -- turns out viruses may cause obesity too…
>
>
>
> The Fat Virus?

### vkiernan — 2012-08-26T16:41:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-47219>

Not much new here at all until I have another consult and direction on some things. I have noticed the last couple of days during my BAB I am getting very warm to the point of sweating. I wonder if this has anything to do with adding progesterone cream to my routine. Really makes me want to go jump in a cold tub and that is not normal for me at all.

Got my share of sunshine, fresh air and cool lake water yesterday. Even skiied and it felt great. Lake was very choppy though so had to stay in the wake. Bummer for sure but at least I got to. My legs and arms are not sore and haven't been all summer the little I have been able to ski. I know that is good but I also know things are not right yet either. Got to get that consult.

I am really waiting for the next webinar. I hope Jack doesn't wait until the end of the month to do it. I want to start that for my gut really badly. I'm pretty sure that is a big problem for me. Sounds like my son has a trashed gut to. Got to try to fix him to. He is implementing a few things like more seafood. He was always on antibiotics as a baby and young child. Always had bronchitis or pnuemonia along with chronic sinusitis. He did outgrow most of that but now he feels like crap all the time. Food runs right thru him and he has no energy. Got to be the gut. This has actually been going on since a young teen and he is 27 now but I didn't really understand any of this until now. We talk a lot about it and I am glad he finally opened up so maybe we can fix him. Trying to get him to go to a funct. med doc. Pretty sure would really help him.

Still doing the same supps but have run out of a few. Not sure I will replace them until my next consult and I get the go ahead.

No weight loss from stopping the HC yet. Bummer. Seems I am really stuck right now. I only want to lose what it made me gain but I can't even do that.

I sure enjoyed it too. I think a tarp would take care of the cover part, but because of the community I live in, I really need something I could lock down because of the "children" who could potentially get into it. I've looked at deck boxes with locks too, but most are not water tight so I'd need to line it with something.

### vkiernan — 2012-09-04T14:53:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-49327>

Not really posting as not much is new. Still doing the progesterone and that seems to be going well. I am still getting warm when I eat BAB. Got to be related to the progesterone. Wasn't happening prior to. Went fishing yesterday with my bro and we did ok. We each caught about 7 gills. Not great, but didn't get skunked either.

Holy sleep last night. Fell asleep on the couch around 8, went to bed at 9 and woke at 5. WOW! If I could do that every night, I think I would get better. Seems like I sleep better thru the night the earlier I go to bed.

Today starts my few week's from hell at work. Fiscal year end and there is sooooo much work to be done. I just have to buck up and focus some how.

I see the doc in a 1.5 weeks. I will have to print out the hormone 101 blog and give it to her to explain why I am not taking the t4 with the Armour. Although, she does know that stress creates rt3 so I don't know why she would want me to take it knowing my stress level. I am going to talk to her about my thyroid and see if we can do something different. Also thinking it is about time to check my ASI. I believe it is a whole lot better. I wake up naturally every morning. I never use an alarm clock and I am tired at night. Seems like if I could do something to give me energy in the afternoon, I would be on a roll. I am wondering if it is time to do a little exercise? That really did help the last time I was exercising seriously. Perhaps this time, I do yoga or something like that. This visit will tell me if I need to check out Dr. Stanger (sp?) or not. She is still on my list of maybes. Maybe I need both.

I have been feeling better again lately. Seems like if my hormones are in better shape, I am not nearly as stressed as the little things don't bother me. Things flow much better at work and at home. I'm sure dh notices too.

The one thing I have to figure out is how do get my body to not get that whacked out feeling when I am soooo hungry? It usually happens in the evening if I don't get dinner on time. I absolutely hate it. It is this "got to eat" feeling and it makes me crabby if I don't eat. I don't understand why after all this time, I still have it?????

> Today starts my few week's from hell at work. Fiscal year end and there is sooooo much work to be done. I just have to buck up and focus some how.

I feel your pain. My company works almost exclusively with federal gov't contracts. Funding has to be used up by last day of September, so the whole month is basically a free-for-all here...and a NIGHTMARE for me, since I'm in accounting.

### 2bls — 2012-09-04T20:33:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-49403>

vkiernan, I just popped in to say hi and thanks for mentioning OAT axis imbalance in your OP. My LR since May has uncovered a severe adrenal issue and since doing reading on OAT axis imbalance on DrLam.com I thought I would come to the forums here to see if anyone else has experience with OAT axis imbalance. I still have to get the saliva testing but my history of health issues from childhood could be a textbook history of OAT axis imbalance. I think you might be the only person on the boards here that even knows what that is. Just wanted to say thanks for your thoughts and experiences, I hope to start my road to recovery very soon. All the best

### vkiernan — 2012-09-04T20:47:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/better-late-than-never.961/post-49406>

> **2BLS;49930 wrote:** vkiernan, I just popped in to say hi and thanks for mentioning OAT axis imbalance in your OP.
